*/\n   110→export const fetchAllHotmartUsers = async (accessToken: string): Promise<HotmartUser[]> => {\n   111→  let allUsers: HotmartUser[] = []\n   112→  let nextPageToken: string | null = null\n   113→  let pageCount = 0\n   114→  const subdomain = process.env.subdomain || 'ograndeinvestimento-bomrmk'\n   115→\n   116→  console.log(`📡 [HotmartFetch] Iniciando busca de utilizadores...`)\n   117→\n   118→  try {\n   119→    do {\n   120→      pageCount++\n   121→      let requestUrl = `https://developers.hotmart.com/club/api/v1/users?subdomain=${subdomain}`\n   122→      if (nextPageToken) {\n   123→        requestUrl += `&page_token=${encodeURIComponent(nextPageToken)}`\n   124→      }\n   125→\n   126→      console.log(`📄 [HotmartFetch] Página ${pageCount}: ${requestUrl}`)\n   127→\n   128→      const response = await axios.get(requestUrl, {\n   129→        headers: {\n   130→          'Authorization': `Bearer ${accessToken}`,\n   131→          'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n   132→        },\n   133→        timeout: 30000 // ✅ 30s timeout por request\n   134→      })\n   135→\n   136→      // Normalizar resposta (diferentes formatos possíveis)\n   137→      const users = response.data.users || response.data.items || response.data.data || []\n   138→      const pageInfo = response.data.page_info || response.data.pageInfo || response.data.pagination || {}\n   139→\n   140→      if (!Array.isArray(users)) {\n   141→        throw new Error(`Resposta inválida: esperado array, recebido ${typeof users}`)\n   142→      }\n   143→\n   144→      allUsers = allUsers.concat(users)\n   145→      nextPageToken = pageInfo.next_page_token || pageInfo.nextPageToken || null\n   146→\n   147→console.log(`✅ [HotmartFetch] Página ${pageCount}: ${users.length} utilizadores | Total: ${allUsers.length}`)\n   148→console.log(`   nextPageToken: ${nextPageToken ? 'exists' : 'null'}`)\n   149→\n   150→// Rate limiting (só se houver próxima página)\n   151→if (nextPageToken) {\n   152→  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200))\n   153→}\n   154→    } while (nextPageToken)\n   155→\n   156→    console.log(`🎯 [HotmartFetch] Busca completa: ${allUsers.length} utilizadores em ${pageCount} páginas`)\n   157→    return allUsers\n   158→\n   159→  } catch (error: any) {\n   160→    console.error('❌ [HotmartFetch] Erro:', error.response?.data || error.message)\n   161→    throw new Error(`Erro ao buscar utilizadores: ${error.message}`)\n   162→  }\n   163→}\n   164→\n   165→/**\n   166→ * Buscar lições de um utilizador específico\n   167→ * @param {string} userId - ID do utilizador na Hotmart\n   168→ * @param {string} accessToken - Token de autenticação\n   169→ * @returns {Promise<HotmartLesson[]>} Lista de lições\n   170→ */\n   171→export const fetchUserLessons = async (\n   172→  userId: string,\n   173→  accessToken: string\n   174→): Promise<HotmartLesson[]> => {\n   175→  try {\n   176→    const subdomain = process.env.subdomain || 'ograndeinvestimento-bomrmk'\n   177→\n   178→const response = await axios.get(\n   179→  `https://developers.hotmart.com/club/api/v1/users/${userId}/lessons?subdomain=${subdomain}`,\n   180→  {\n   181→    headers: {\n   182→      'Authorization': `Bearer ${accessToken}`,\n   183→      'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n   184→    },\n   185→    timeout: 10000 // ✅ 10s timeout por request\n   186→  }\n   187→)\n   188→\n   189→    return response.data.lessons || []\n   190→\n   191→  } catch (error: any) {\n   192→    console.warn(`⚠️ [HotmartFetch] Erro ao buscar lições do user ${userId}:`, error.message)\n   193→    return []\n   194→  }\n   195→}\n   196→\n   197→/**\n   198→ * Buscar progresso de múltiplos utilizadores em paralelo (com controle de concorrência)\n   199→ * @param {HotmartUser[]} users - Lista de utilizadores\n   200→ * @param {string} accessToken - Token de autenticação\n   201→ * @param {number} concurrency - Máximo de requests simultâneos (default: 5)\n   202→ * @returns {Promise<Map<string, ProgressData>>} Mapa de userId -> progressData\n   203→ */\n   204→export const fetchBatchUserProgress = async (\n   205→  users: HotmartUser[],\n   206→  accessToken: string,\n   207→  concurrency: number = 5\n   208→): Promise<Map<string, ProgressData>> => {\n   209→  \n   210→  const progressMap = new Map<string, ProgressData>()\n   211→  const userIds = users\n   212→    .map(u => u.id || u.user_id || u.uid || u.code)\n   213→    .filter(Boolean) as string[]\n   214→\n   215→  console.log(`📊 [HotmartProgress] Iniciando fetch de progresso...`)\n   216→  console.log(`   👥 Total users: ${userIds.length}`)\n   217→  console.log(`   🔢 Concurrency: ${concurrency}`)\n   218→  console.log(`   ⏱️  Estimativa: ~${Math.ceil(userIds.length / concurrency * 0.5 / 60)} minutos`)\n   219→\n   220→  const startTime = Date.now()\n   221→  let processedCount = 0\n   222→\n   223→  // Processar em batches\n   224→  for (let i = 0; i < userIds.length; i += concurrency) {\n   225→    const batch = userIds.slice(i, i + concurrency)\n   226→    const batchNum = Math.floor(i / concurrency) + 1\n   227→    const totalBatches = Math.ceil(userIds.length / concurrency)\n   228→    \n   229→    const batchStart = Date.now()\n   230→    \n   231→    const progressPromises = batch.map(async (userId) => {\n   232→      try {\n   233→        const lessons = await fetchUserLessons(userId, accessToken)\n   234→        if (lessons.length > 0) {\n   235→          const progress = calculateProgress(lessons)\n   236→          progressMap.set(userId, progress)\n   237→        }\n   238→      } catch (error) {\n   239→        // Silencioso - não logar cada erro\n   240→      }\n   241→    })\n   242→\n   243→    await Promise.all(progressPromises)\n   244→    \n   245→    processedCount += batch.length\n   246→    const batchDuration = Date.now() - batchStart\n   247→    const elapsed = Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)\n   248→    const percentage = Math.floor((processedCount / userIds.length) * 100)\n   249→    \n   250→    // ✅ LOG A CADA 10 BATCHES (não todos!)\n   251→    if (batchNum % 10 === 0 || batchNum === totalBatches) {\n   252→      const remaining = Math.ceil((userIds.length - processedCount) / concurrency * (batchDuration / 1000))\n   253→      console.log(`   📦 Batch ${batchNum}/${totalBatches} (${percentage}%) - ${elapsed}s passados, ~${Math.ceil(remaining / 60)} min restantes`)\n   254→    }\n   255→    \n   256→    // Rate limiting entre batches\n   257→    if (i + concurrency < userIds.length) {\n   258→      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100)) // 100ms\n   259→    }\n   260→  }\n   261→\n   262→  const totalDuration = Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)\n   263→  console.log(`✅ [HotmartProgress] Completo!`)\n   264→  console.log(`   ⏱️  Duração: ${totalDuration}s (${Math.floor(totalDuration / 60)} min)`)\n   265→  console.log(`   📊 Sucesso: ${progressMap.size}/${userIds.length} users (${Math.floor(progressMap.size / userIds.length * 100)}%)`)\n   266→  console.log(`   ⚡ Velocidade: ${(userIds.length / totalDuration).toFixed(1)} users/s`)\n   267→\n   268→  return progressMap\n   269→}\n   270→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   271→// DATA PROCESSING\n   272→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   273→\n   274→/**\n   275→ * Calcular progresso baseado nas lições\n   276→ * @param {HotmartLesson[]} lessons - Lista de lições\n   277→ * @returns {ProgressData} Dados de progresso calculados\n   278→ */\n   279→export const calculateProgress = (lessons: HotmartLesson[]): ProgressData => {\n   280→  if (lessons.length === 0) {\n   281→    return {\n   282→      completedPercentage: 0,\n   283→      total: 0,\n   284→      completed: 0,\n   285→      lessons: [],\n   286→      lastUpdated: new Date()\n   287→    }\n   288→  }\n   289→\n   290→  const completed = lessons.filter(lesson => lesson.is_completed).length\n   291→  const total = lessons.length\n   292→  const completedPercentage = Math.round((completed / total) * 100)\n   293→\n   294→  return {\n   295→    completedPercentage,\n   296→    total,\n   297→    completed,\n   298→    lessons: lessons.map(lesson => ({\n   299→      pageId: lesson.page_id,\n   300→      pageName: lesson.page_name,\n   301→      moduleName: lesson.module_name,\n   302→      isModuleExtra: lesson.is_module_extra,\n   303→      isCompleted: lesson.is_completed,\n   304→      completedDate: lesson.completed_date ? new Date(lesson.completed_date) : undefined\n   305→    })),\n   306→    lastUpdated: new Date()\n   307→  }\n   308→}\n   309→\n   310→/**\n   311→ * Converter timestamp Unix para Date (com validação)\n   312→ * @param {any} timestamp - Timestamp em diversos formatos\n   313→ * @returns {Date | null} Data válida ou null\n   314→ */\n   315→export const convertUnixTimestamp = (timestamp: any): Date | null => {\n   316→  if (!timestamp) return null\n   317→\n   318→  // ISO string\n   319→  if (typeof timestamp === 'string' && timestamp.includes('T') && timestamp.includes('Z')) {\n   320→    const date = new Date(timestamp)\n   321→    if (!isNaN(date.getTime())) {\n   322→      const year = date.getFullYear()\n   323→      if (year >= 2000 && year <= 2030) {\n   324→        return date\n   325→      }\n   326→    }\n   327→    return null\n   328→  }\n   329→\n   330→  // Unix timestamp\n   331→  const numTimestamp = typeof timestamp === 'string' ? parseInt(timestamp, 10) : timestamp\n   332→  if (isNaN(numTimestamp) || numTimestamp <= 0) return null\n   333→\n   334→  // Converter para milliseconds se necessário\n   335→  const timestampMs = numTimestamp < 1e12 ? numTimestamp * 1000 : numTimestamp\n   336→  const date = new Date(timestampMs)\n   337→\n   338→  // Validar ano\n   339→  const year = date.getFullYear()\n   340→  if (year < 2000 || year > 2030) {\n   341→    console.warn(`⚠️ Data suspeita: ${date.toISOString()} (timestamp: ${timestamp})`)\n   342→    return null\n   343→  }\n   344→\n   345→  return date\n   346→}\n   347→\n   348→/**\n   349→ * Normalizar dados do utilizador Hotmart para formato Universal\n   350→ * @param {HotmartUser} hotmartUser - Dados brutos da API\n   351→ * @param {ProgressData} progressData - Dados de progresso (opcional)\n   352→ * @returns {object} Dados normalizados para Universal Sync\n   353→ */\n   354→export const normalizeHotmartUser = (\n   355→  hotmartUser: HotmartUser,\n   356→  progressData?: ProgressData\n   357→) => {\n   358→  const hotmartId = hotmartUser.id || hotmartUser.user_id || hotmartUser.uid || hotmartUser.code\n   359→\n   360→  return {\n   361→    // Identificação\n   362→    email: hotmartUser.email.toLowerCase().trim(),\n   363→    name: hotmartUser.name.trim(),\n   364→    hotmartUserId: hotmartId,\n   365→    \n   366→    // Datas\n   367→    purchaseDate: convertUnixTimestamp(hotmartUser.purchase_date),\n   368→    signupDate: convertUnixTimestamp(hotmartUser.signup_date) || new Date(),\n   369→    firstAccessDate: convertUnixTimestamp(hotmartUser.first_access_date),\n   370→    lastAccessDate: convertUnixTimestamp(hotmartUser.last_access_date),\n   371→    \n   372→    // Status\n   373→    plusAccess: hotmartUser.plus_access || 'WITHOUT_PLUS_ACCESS',\n   374→    \n   375→    // Turmas\n   376→    classId: hotmartUser.class_id,\n   377→    className: hotmartUser.class_name || (hotmartUser.class_id ? `Turma ${hotmartUser.class_id}` : undefined),\n   378→    \n   379→    // Engagement\n   380→    accessCount: Number(hotmartUser.access_count) || 0,\n   381→    engagementLevel: hotmartUser.engagement || 'NONE',\n   382→    \n   383→    // Progresso (se disponível)\n   384→    progress: progressData ? {\n   385→      completedPercentage: progressData.completedPercentage,\n   386→      total: progressData.total,\n   387→      completed: progressData.completed,\n   388→      lessons: progressData.lessons,\n   389→      lastUpdated: progressData.lastUpdated\n   390→    } : undefined\n   391→  }\n   392→}\n   393→\n   394→/**\n   395→ * Validar dados mínimos do utilizador\n   396→ * @param {HotmartUser} user - Dados do utilizador\n   397→ * @returns {boolean} true se válido\n   398→ * @throws {Error} Se dados inválidos\n   399→ */\n   400→export const validateHotmartUser = (user: HotmartUser): boolean => {\n   401→  if (!user.email || !user.email.trim()) {\n   402→    throw new Error('Email inválido')\n   403→  }\n   404→  \n   405→  if (!user.name || !user.name.trim()) {\n   406→    throw new Error('Nome inválido')\n   407→  }\n   408→  \n   409→  const hotmartId = user.id || user.user_id || user.uid || user.code\n   410→  if (!hotmartId) {\n   411→    throw new Error('ID Hotmart inválido')\n   412→  }\n   413→  \n   414→  return true\n   415→}\n   416→\n   417→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   418→// EXPORT\n   419→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   420→\n   421→export default {\n   422→  // Auth\n   423→  getHotmartAccessToken,\n   424→  \n   425→  // Fetch\n   426→  fetchAllHotmartUsers,\n   427→  fetchUserLessons,\n   428→  fetchBatchUserProgress,\n   429→  \n   430→  // Process\n   431→  calculateProgress,\n   432→  convertUnixTimestamp,\n   433→  normalizeHotmartUser,\n   434→  validateHotmartUser\n   435→}\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. {Promise<string>} Access token válido\n */\nexport const getHotmartAccessToken = async (): Promise<string> => {\n  try {\n    const clientId = process.env.HOTMART_CLIENT_ID\n    const clientSecret = process.env.HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET\n\n    if (!clientId || !clientSecret) {\n      throw new Error('HOTMART_CLIENT_ID e HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET são obrigatórios')\n    }\n\n    const basicAuth = Buffer.from(`${clientId}:${clientSecret}`).toString('base64')\n\n    console.log(`🔐 [HotmartAuth] Gerando token...`)\n\n    const response = await axios.post(\n      'https://api-sec-vlc.hotmart.com/security/oauth/token',\n      new URLSearchParams({ grant_type: 'client_credentials' }),\n      {\n        headers: {\n          'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',\n          'Authorization': `Basic ${basicAuth}`\n        }\n      }\n    )\n\n    if (!response.data.access_token) {\n      throw new Error('Access token não encontrado na resposta')\n    }\n\n    console.log(`✅ [HotmartAuth] Token obtido - Expira em: ${response.data.expires_in}s`)\n    return response.data.access_token\n\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    console.error('❌ [HotmartAuth] Erro:', error.response?.data || error.message)\n    throw new Error(\n      `Falha ao obter token: ${error.response?.data?.error_description || error.message}`\n    )\n  }\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// DATA FETCHING\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n/**\n * Buscar TODOS os utilizadores da Hotmart (paginação automática)\n * @param {string} accessToken - Token de autenticação\n * @returns {Promise<HotmartUser[]>} Lista completa de utilizadores\n */\nexport const fetchAllHotmartUsers = async (accessToken: string): Promise<HotmartUser[]> => {\n  let allUsers: HotmartUser[] = []\n  let nextPageToken: string | null = null\n  let pageCount = 0\n  const subdomain = process.env.subdomain || 'ograndeinvestimento-bomrmk'\n\n  console.log(`📡 [HotmartFetch] Iniciando busca de utilizadores...`)\n\n  try {\n    do {\n      pageCount++\n      let requestUrl = `https://developers.hotmart.com/club/api/v1/users?subdomain=${subdomain}`\n      if (nextPageToken) {\n        requestUrl += `&page_token=${encodeURIComponent(nextPageToken)}`\n      }\n\n      console.log(`📄 [HotmartFetch] Página ${pageCount}: ${requestUrl}`)\n\n      const response = await axios.get(requestUrl, {\n        headers: {\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${accessToken}`,\n          'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n        },\n        timeout: 30000 // ✅ 30s timeout por request\n      })\n\n      // Normalizar resposta (diferentes formatos possíveis)\n      const users = response.data.users || response.data.items || response.data.data || []\n      const pageInfo = response.data.page_info || response.data.pageInfo || response.data.pagination || {}\n\n      if (!Array.isArray(users)) {\n        throw new Error(`Resposta inválida: esperado array, recebido ${typeof users}`)\n      }\n\n      allUsers = allUsers.concat(users)\n      nextPageToken = pageInfo.next_page_token || pageInfo.nextPageToken || null\n\nconsole.log(`✅ [HotmartFetch] Página ${pageCount}: ${users.length} utilizadores | Total: ${allUsers.length}`)\nconsole.log(`   nextPageToken: ${nextPageToken ? 'exists' : 'null'}`)\n\n// Rate limiting (só se houver próxima página)\nif (nextPageToken) {\n  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200))\n}\n    } while (nextPageToken)\n\n    console.log(`🎯 [HotmartFetch] Busca completa: ${allUsers.length} utilizadores em ${pageCount} páginas`)\n    return allUsers\n\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    console.error('❌ [HotmartFetch] Erro:', error.response?.data || error.message)\n    throw new Error(`Erro ao buscar utilizadores: ${error.message}`)\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Buscar lições de um utilizador específico\n * @param {string} userId - ID do utilizador na Hotmart\n * @param {string} accessToken - Token de autenticação\n * @returns {Promise<HotmartLesson[]>} Lista de lições\n */\nexport const fetchUserLessons = async (\n  userId: string,\n  accessToken: string\n): Promise<HotmartLesson[]> => {\n  try {\n    const subdomain = process.env.subdomain || 'ograndeinvestimento-bomrmk'\n\nconst response = await axios.get(\n  `https://developers.hotmart.com/club/api/v1/users/${userId}/lessons?subdomain=${subdomain}`,\n  {\n    headers: {\n      'Authorization': `Bearer ${accessToken}`,\n      'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n    },\n    timeout: 10000 // ✅ 10s timeout por request\n  }\n)\n\n    return response.data.lessons || []\n\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    console.warn(`⚠️ [HotmartFetch] Erro ao buscar lições do user ${userId}:`, error.message)\n    return []\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Buscar progresso de múltiplos utilizadores em paralelo (com controle de concorrência)\n * @param {HotmartUser[]} users - Lista de utilizadores\n * @param {string} accessToken - Token de autenticação\n * @param {number} concurrency - Máximo de requests simultâneos (default: 5)\n * @returns {Promise<Map<string, ProgressData>>} Mapa de userId -> progressData\n */\nexport const fetchBatchUserProgress = async (\n  users: HotmartUser[],\n  accessToken: string,\n  concurrency: number = 5\n): Promise<Map<string, ProgressData>> => {\n  \n  const progressMap = new Map<string, ProgressData>()\n  const userIds = users\n    .map(u => u.id || u.user_id || u.uid || u.code)\n    .filter(Boolean) as string[]\n\n  console.log(`📊 [HotmartProgress] Iniciando fetch de progresso...`)\n  console.log(`   👥 Total users: ${userIds.length}`)\n  console.log(`   🔢 Concurrency: ${concurrency}`)\n  console.log(`   ⏱️  Estimativa: ~${Math.ceil(userIds.length / concurrency * 0.5 / 60)} minutos`)\n\n  const startTime = Date.now()\n  let processedCount = 0\n\n  // Processar em batches\n  for (let i = 0; i < userIds.length; i += concurrency) {\n    const batch = userIds.slice(i, i + concurrency)\n    const batchNum = Math.floor(i / concurrency) + 1\n    const totalBatches = Math.ceil(userIds.length / concurrency)\n    \n    const batchStart = Date.now()\n    \n    const progressPromises = batch.map(async (userId) => {\n      try {\n        const lessons = await fetchUserLessons(userId, accessToken)\n        if (lessons.length > 0) {\n          const progress = calculateProgress(lessons)\n          progressMap.set(userId, progress)\n        }\n      } catch (error) {\n        // Silencioso - não logar cada erro\n      }\n    })\n\n    await Promise.all(progressPromises)\n    \n    processedCount += batch.length\n    const batchDuration = Date.now() - batchStart\n    const elapsed = Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)\n    const percentage = Math.floor((processedCount / userIds.length) * 100)\n    \n    // ✅ LOG A CADA 10 BATCHES (não todos!)\n    if (batchNum % 10 === 0 || batchNum === totalBatches) {\n      const remaining = Math.ceil((userIds.length - processedCount) / concurrency * (batchDuration / 1000))\n      console.log(`   📦 Batch ${batchNum}/${totalBatches} (${percentage}%) - ${elapsed}s passados, ~${Math.ceil(remaining / 60)} min restantes`)\n    }\n    \n    // Rate limiting entre batches\n    if (i + concurrency < userIds.length) {\n      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100)) // 100ms\n    }\n  }\n\n  const totalDuration = Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)\n  console.log(`✅ [HotmartProgress] Completo!`)\n  console.log(`   ⏱️  Duração: ${totalDuration}s (${Math.floor(totalDuration / 60)} min)`)\n  console.log(`   📊 Sucesso: ${progressMap.size}/${userIds.length} users (${Math.floor(progressMap.size / userIds.length * 100)}%)`)\n  console.log(`   ⚡ Velocidade: ${(userIds.length / totalDuration).toFixed(1)} users/s`)\n\n  return progressMap\n}\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// DATA PROCESSING\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n/**\n * Calcular progresso baseado nas lições\n * @param {HotmartLesson[]} lessons - Lista de lições\n * @returns {ProgressData} Dados de progresso calculados\n */\nexport const calculateProgress = (lessons: HotmartLesson[]): ProgressData => {\n  if (lessons.length === 0) {\n    return {\n      completedPercentage: 0,\n      total: 0,\n      completed: 0,\n      lessons: [],\n      lastUpdated: new Date()\n    }\n  }\n\n  const completed = lessons.filter(lesson => lesson.is_completed).length\n  const total = lessons.length\n  const completedPercentage = Math.round((completed / total) * 100)\n\n  return {\n    completedPercentage,\n    total,\n    completed,\n    lessons: lessons.map(lesson => ({\n      pageId: lesson.page_id,\n      pageName: lesson.page_name,\n      moduleName: lesson.module_name,\n      isModuleExtra: lesson.is_module_extra,\n      isCompleted: lesson.is_completed,\n      completedDate: lesson.completed_date ? new Date(lesson.completed_date) : undefined\n    })),\n    lastUpdated: new Date()\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Converter timestamp Unix para Date (com validação)\n * @param {any} timestamp - Timestamp em diversos formatos\n * @returns {Date | null} Data válida ou null\n */\nexport const convertUnixTimestamp = (timestamp: any): Date | null => {\n  if (!timestamp) return null\n\n  // ISO string\n  if (typeof timestamp === 'string' && timestamp.includes('T') && timestamp.includes('Z')) {\n    const date = new Date(timestamp)\n    if (!isNaN(date.getTime())) {\n      const year = date.getFullYear()\n      if (year >= 2000 && year <= 2030) {\n        return date\n      }\n    }\n    return null\n  }\n\n  // Unix timestamp\n  const numTimestamp = typeof timestamp === 'string' ? parseInt(timestamp, 10) : timestamp\n  if (isNaN(numTimestamp) || numTimestamp <= 0) return null\n\n  // Converter para milliseconds se necessário\n  const timestampMs = numTimestamp < 1e12 ? numTimestamp * 1000 : numTimestamp\n  const date = new Date(timestampMs)\n\n  // Validar ano\n  const year = date.getFullYear()\n  if (year < 2000 || year > 2030) {\n    console.warn(`⚠️ Data suspeita: ${date.toISOString()} (timestamp: ${timestamp})`)\n    return null\n  }\n\n  return date\n}\n\n/**\n * Normalizar dados do utilizador Hotmart para formato Universal\n * @param {HotmartUser} hotmartUser - Dados brutos da API\n * @param {ProgressData} progressData - Dados de progresso (opcional)\n * @returns {object} Dados normalizados para Universal Sync\n */\nexport const normalizeHotmartUser = (\n  hotmartUser: HotmartUser,\n  progressData?: ProgressData\n) => {\n  const hotmartId = hotmartUser.id || hotmartUser.user_id || hotmartUser.uid || hotmartUser.code\n\n  return {\n    // Identificação\n    email: hotmartUser.email.toLowerCase().trim(),\n    name: hotmartUser.name.trim(),\n    hotmartUserId: hotmartId,\n    \n    // Datas\n    purchaseDate: convertUnixTimestamp(hotmartUser.purchase_date),\n    signupDate: convertUnixTimestamp(hotmartUser.signup_date) || new Date(),\n    firstAccessDate: convertUnixTimestamp(hotmartUser.first_access_date),\n    lastAccessDate: convertUnixTimestamp(hotmartUser.last_access_date),\n    \n    // Status\n    plusAccess: hotmartUser.plus_access || 'WITHOUT_PLUS_ACCESS',\n    \n    // Turmas\n    classId: hotmartUser.class_id,\n    className: hotmartUser.class_name || (hotmartUser.class_id ? `Turma ${hotmartUser.class_id}` : undefined),\n    \n    // Engagement\n    accessCount: Number(hotmartUser.access_count) || 0,\n    engagementLevel: hotmartUser.engagement || 'NONE',\n    \n    // Progresso (se disponível)\n    progress: progressData ? {\n      completedPercentage: progressData.completedPercentage,\n      total: progressData.total,\n      completed: progressData.completed,\n      lessons: progressData.lessons,\n      lastUpdated: progressData.lastUpdated\n    } : undefined\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Validar dados mínimos do utilizador\n * @param {HotmartUser} user - Dados do utilizador\n * @returns {boolean} true se válido\n * @throws {Error} Se dados inválidos\n */\nexport const validateHotmartUser = (user: HotmartUser): boolean => {\n  if (!user.email || !user.email.trim()) {\n    throw new Error('Email inválido')\n  }\n  \n  if (!user.name || !user.name.trim()) {\n    throw new Error('Nome inválido')\n  }\n  \n  const hotmartId = user.id || user.user_id || user.uid || user.code\n  if (!hotmartId) {\n    throw new Error('ID Hotmart inválido')\n  }\n  \n  return true\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// EXPORT\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nexport default {\n  // Auth\n  getHotmartAccessToken,\n  \n  // Fetch\n  fetchAllHotmartUsers,\n  fetchUserLessons,\n  fetchBatchUserProgress,\n  \n  // Process\n  calculateProgress,\n  convertUnixTimestamp,\n  normalizeHotmartUser,\n  validateHotmartUser\n}","numLines":435,"startLine":1,"totalLines":435}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"6677f8d8-a11d-4e8e-bec0-03c2e82f85e0"}

fetchAllHotmartClasses(accessToken: string): Promise<HotmartClass[]> {\n  console.log('📡 [Hotmart] Buscando todas as turmas via utilizadores...')\n\n  const classMap = new Map<string, HotmartClass>()\n  let nextPageToken: string | null = null\n  let pageCount = 0\n  let totalUsers = 0\n\n  do {\n    pageCount++\n    let requestUrl = response = await axios.get(requestUrl, {\n      headers: {\n        'Authorization': `Bearer ${accessToken}`,\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n      },\n      timeout: 30000\n    })\n\n    const users = response.data.users || response.data.items || response.data.data || []\n    const pageInfo = response.data.page_info || response.data.pageInfo || {}\n\n    totalUsers += users.length\n\n (!classMap.has(classId)) {\n          classMap.set(classId, {\n            classId,\n            className: className || undefined,\n            studentCount: 0,\n            studentEmails: []\n disponível e ainda não temos\n        if (className && !cls.className) {\n          cls.className = className\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    nextPageToken = pageInfo.next_page_token || null\n\n Array.from(classMap.values()).sort((a, b) => b.studentCount - a.studentCount)\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// CURSEDUCA: BUSCAR TODOS OS GRUPOS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function fetchAllCurseducaGroups(): Promise<CurseducaGroup[]> {\n  console.log('📡 [CursEduca] Buscando todos os grupos...')\n\n axios.get(`${CURSEDUCA_API_URL}/groups`, {\n      headers,\n      timeout: 30000\n    })\n\n    const groups = Array.isArray(response.data)\n      ? response.data\n      : response.data?.data || groupId: group.id, limit: 1, offset: 0 },\n            headers,\n            timeout: 10000\n          }\n        )\n\n        // Tentar obter total de várias formas\n        const totalMembers = membersResponse.data?.total ||\n                            membersResponse.data?.data?.length ||\n                            membersResponse.data?.length || 0\n\n        groupsWithCount.push({\n          id: group.id,\n          uuid: group.uuid,\n          name: group.name,\n          memberCount: totalMembers\n        })\n\n        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200))\n\n      } catch (error) {\n        groupsWithCount.push({\n          id: group.id,\n          uuid: group.uuid,\n          name: group.name,\n          memberCount: 0\n        })\n      }\n    }\n\n    return groupsWithCount\n\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    console.error('❌ [CursEduca] Erro:', error.message)\n    return []\n  }\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// DATABASE: BUSCAR TURMAS LOCAIS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function fetchDatabaseClasses(): Promise<any[]> {\n  console.log('📡 [Database] Buscando turmas ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// MAIN: DIAGNÓSTICO\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function runDiagnostic(): Criar conjuntos para comparação\n  const hotmartClassIds = new Set(hotmartClasses.map(c => c.classId))\n  const curseducaGroupIds = new Set(curseducaGroups.map(g => g.uuid))\n  const dbClassIds = new Set(dbClasses.map(c => c.classId))\n\n  // 5. Encontrar diferenças\n  const missingInDB: { classId: string, className?: string, source: string }[] = []\n\n  // Turmas Hotmart em falta\n  for (const cls of hotmartClasses) {\n    if (!dbClassIds.has(cls.classId)) {\n      missingInDB.push({\n        classId: cls.classId,\n        className: cls.className,\n        source: 'hotmart'\n      })\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Grupos CursEduca em falta\n  for (const group of curseducaGroups) {\n    if (!dbClassIds.has(group.uuid)) {\n      missingInDB.push({\n        classId: group.uuid,\n        className: group.name,\n        source: 'curseduca'\n      })\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Turmas na BD que não existem nas APIs\n  const extraInDB = dbClasses\n    .filter(c => !hotmartClassIds.has(c.classId) && !curseducaGroupIds.has(c.classId))\n IDs`)\n  }\n\n  const classesWithoutName = dbClasses.filter(c => !c.name || c.name.startsWith('Turma '))\n  if (classesWithoutName.length > 0) {\n    recommendations.push(`🟡 ${classesWithoutName.length} turmas têm nome genérico \"Turma X\" - podem precisar de nome manual`)\n  }\n\n  if (extraInDB.length > 0) {\n    recommendations.push(`🟡 ${extraInDB.length} turmas na BD não existem nas APIs - podem ser órfãs ou manuais`)\n  }\n\n  if (hotmartClasses.length !== hotmartSyncClasses) {\n    recommendations.push(`📊 Hotmart: ${hotmartClasses.length} turmas na API vs ${hotmartSyncClasses} na BD`)\n  }\n\n  // Criar relatório\n  const report: DiagnosticReport = {\n    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    hotmart: {\n      totalClassesFound: ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function getHotmartAccessToken(): Promise<string> {\n  if (!HOTMART_CLIENT_ID || !HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET) {\n    throw new Error('HOTMART_CLIENT_ID e HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET são obrigatórios no .env')\n  }\n\n  const basicAuth = Buffer.from(`${HOTMART_CLIENT_ID}:${HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET}`).toString('base64')\n\n  const const users = response.data.users || response.data.items || response.data.data || []\n    const pageInfo = response.data.page_info || response.data.pageInfo || {}\n\n    totalUsers += users.length\n\n       classMap.set(classId, {\n            classId,\n            className,\n            studentCount: 1\n          })\n        } else {\n          const existing = classMap.get(classId)!\n          existing.studentCount++\n\n          // Preferir nome não-nulo\n          if (className && !existing.className) {\n            existing.className = className\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    nextPageToken = pageInfo.next_page_token || null\n\n    if (pageCount % 10 === 0) {\n      console.log(`   📄 Página ${pageCount}: ${classMap.size} turmas únicas`)\n    }\n\n    if ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function syncHotmartClasses(\n  hotmartClasses: Map<string, HotmartClassData>,\n  result: SyncResult\n): Promise<void> {\n ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function getHotmartAccessToken(): Promise<string> {\n  if (!HOTMART_CLIENT_ID || !HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET) {\n    throw new Error('HOTMART_CLIENT_ID e HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET são obrigatórios no .env')\n  }\n\n  const basicAuth = Buffer.from(`${HOTMART_CLIENT_ID}:${HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET}`).toString('base64')\n\n  const response = await axios.post(\n    'https://api-sec-vlc.hotmart.com/security/oauth/token',\n    new URLSearchParams({ grant_type: 'client_credentials' }),\n    {\n      headers: {\n        'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',\n        'Authorization': `Basic ${basicAuth}`\n      }\n    }\n  )\n\n  return response.data.access_token\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// HOTMART: BUSCAR TODAS AS TURMAS COM NOMES\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function fetchAllHotmartClasses(accessToken: string): Promise<Map<string, HotmartClassData>> {\n  console.log('📡 [Hotmart] Buscando todas as turmas...')\n\n  const classMap = new Map<string, HotmartClassData>()\n  let nextPageToken: string | null = null\n  let pageCount = 0\n  let totalUsers = 0\n\n  do {\n    pageCount++\n    let requestUrl = `https://developers.hotmart.com/club/api/v1/users?subdomain=${HOTMART_SUBDOMAIN}`\n    if (nextPageToken) {\n      requestUrl += `&page_token=${encodeURIComponent(nextPageToken)}`\n    }\n\n    const const users = response.data.users || response.data.items || response.data.data || []\n    const pageInfo = response.data.page_info || response.data.pageInfo || {}\n\n    totalUsers += users.length\n\n    for (const user of users) {\n      const classId = user.class_id?.trim()\n      const className = user.class_name?.trim() || null\n\n      if (classId) {\n        if (!classMap.has(classId)) {\n          classMap.set(classId, {\n            classId,\n            className,\n            studentCount: 1\n          })\n        } else {\n          const existing = classMap.get(classId)!\n          existing.studentCount++\n\n          // Preferir nome não-nulo\n          if (className && !existing.className) {\n            existing.className = className\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    nextPageToken = pageInfo.next_page_token || null\n\n    if (pageCount % 10 === 0) {\n      console.log(`   📄 Página ${pageCount}: ${classMap.size} turmas únicas`)\n    }\n\n    if (nextPageToken) {\n      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200))\n    }\n\n  } while (nextPageToken)\n\n  console.log(`✅ [Hotmart] ${classMap.size} turmas encontradas (${totalUsers} users)`)\n\n  return classMap\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// CURSEDUCA: BUSCAR TODOS OS GRUPOS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function fetchAllCurseducaGroups(): Promise<CurseducaGroupData[]> {\n  console.log('📡 [CursEduca] Buscando todos os grupos...')\n\n ${result.hotmart.errors.length}`)\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// SYNC: CURSEDUCA\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function syncCurseducaGroups(\n  groups: CurseducaGroupData[],\n  result: SyncResult\n): Promise<void> {\n  console.log('\\n' + '─'.repeat(40))\n  console.log('🔄 SINCRONIZANDO GRUPOS CURSEDUCA')\n  console.log('─'.repeat(40))\n\n  for (const group of groups) {\n    try {\n      // Usar UUID como classId para CursEduca\n      const existing = await Class.findOne({\n        $or: [\n          { (!DRY_RUN) {\n          await Class.create({\n            classId: group.uuid,\n            curseducaId: String(group.id),\n            curseducaUuid: group.uuid,\n            name: group.name,\n       studentCount: group.memberCount,\n            lastSyncAt: new Date()\n          })\n        }\n\n        result.curseduca.created++\n        result.curseduca.details.push({\n          groupId: group.uuid,\n          action: 'created',\n          name: group.name\n        })\n\n        console.log(`   ✅ CRIADO: ${group.name} (ID: ${group.id}, ${group.memberCount} membros)`)\n\n      } else {\n        // Atualizar se necessário\n        const updates: any = {\n          lastSyncAt: new Date(),\n          studentCount: group.memberCount,\n          curseducaId: String(group.id),\n          curseducaUuid: group.uuid\n        }\n\n        let needsUpdate = false\n\n        if (existing.name !== group.name && FORCE_UPDATE) {\n          updates.name = group.name\n          needsUpdate = true\n        }\n\n        if (needsUpdate || existing.studentCount !== group.memberCount) {\n          if (!DRY_RUN) {\n            await Class.findByIdAndUpdate(existing._id, updates)\n          }\n\n          result.curseduca.updated++\n          result.curseduca.details.push({\n            groupId: group.uuid,\n            action: 'updated',\n            name: group.name\n          })\n\n        } else {\n          result.curseduca.unchanged++\n          result.curseduca.details.push({\n            groupId: group.uuid,\n            action: 'unchanged',\n            name: group.name\n          })\n        }\n      }\n\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      result.curseduca.errors.push(`${group.uuid}: ${error.message}`)\n      result.curseduca.details.push({\n        groupId: group.uuid,\n        action: 'error',\n        name: group.name,\n        error: error.message\n      })\n      console.log(`   ❌ ERRO: ${group.name} - ${error.message}`)\n    }\n  }\n\n  console.log(`\\n   📊 Resumo CursEduca:`)\n  console.log(`      Criados: ${result.curseduca.created}`)\n  console.log(`      Atualizados: ${result.curseduca.updated}`)\n  console.log(`      Sem alteração: ${result.curseduca.unchanged}`)\n  console.log(`      Erros: ${result.curseduca.errors.length}`)\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// MAIN\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function main() {\n  console.log('\\n' + '═'.repeat(60))\n  console.log('🔄 SINCRONIZAÇÃO DE TURMAS EM FALTA')\n  console.log('═'.repeat(60))\n\n  if (DRY_RUN) {\n    console.log('⚠️  MODO DRY-RUN: Nenhuma alteração será feita na BD')\n  }\n  if (FORCE_UPDATE) {\n    console.log('⚠️  MODO FORCE: Nomes serão atualizados mesmo se já existirem')\n  }\n\n  const result: SyncResult = {\n    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    dryRun: DRY_RUN,\n    forceUpdate: FORCE_UPDATE,\n    hotmart: {\n      totalFound: 0,\n      created: 0,\n      updated: 0,\n      unchanged: 0,\n      errors: [],\n      details: []\n    },\n    curseduca: {\n      totalFound: 0,\n      created: 0,\n      updated: 0,\n      unchanged: 0,\n      errors: [],\n      details: []\n    }\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Conectar MongoDB\n    console.log('\\n🔌 Conectando ao MongoDB...')\n    await mongoose.connect(MONGODB_URI)\n    console.log('✅ MongoDB conectado')\n\n    // 1. Buscar turmas Hotmart\n    console.log('\\n' + '─'.repeat(40))\n    console.log('📊 PASSO 1: BUSCAR TURMAS HOTMART')\n    console.log('─'.repeat(40))\n    const accessToken = await getHotmartAccessToken()\n    const hotmartClasses = await fetchAllHotmartClasses(accessToken)\n    result.hotmart.totalFound = hotmartClasses.size\n\n    // 2. Buscar grupos CursEduca\n    console.log('\\n' + '─'.repeat(40))\n    console.log('📊 PASSO 2: BUSCAR GRUPOS CURSEDUCA')\n    console.log('─'.repeat(40))\n    const curseducaGroups = await fetchAllCurseducaGroups()\n    result.curseduca.totalFound = curseducaGroups.length\n\n    // 3. Sincronizar Hotmart\n    await syncHotmartClasses(hotmartClasses, result)\n\n    // 4. Sincronizar CursEduca\n    await syncCurseducaGroups(curseducaGroups, result)\n\n    // 5. Resumo final\n    console.log('\\n' + '═'.repeat(60))\n    console.log('📋 RESUMO FINAL')\n    console.log('═'.repeat(60))\n\n    console.log(`\\n📊 HOTMART:`)\n    console.log(`   Total encontrado: ${result.hotmart.totalFound}`)\n    console.log(`   Criadas: ${result.hotmart.created}`)\n    console.log(`   Atualizadas: ${result.hotmart.updated}`)\n    console.log(`   Sem alteração: ${result.hotmart.unchanged}`)\n    console.log(`   Erros: ${result.hotmart.errors.length}`)\n\n    console.log(`\\n📊 CURSEDUCA:`)\n    console.log(`   Total encontrado: ${result.curseduca.totalFound}`)\n    console.log(`   Criados: ${result.curseduca.created}`)\n    console.log(`   Atualizados: ${result.curseduca.updated}`)\n    console.log(`   Sem alteração: ${result.curseduca.unchanged}`)\n    console.log(`   Erros: ${result.curseduca.errors.length}`)\n\n    // Guardar resultado\n    const outputDir = path.join(__dirname, '..', 'sync-results')\n    if (!fs.existsSync(outputDir)) {\n      fs.mkdirSync(outputDir, { recursive: true })\n    }\n\n    const filename = `classes-sync-${DRY_RUN ? 'dry-run-' : ''}${new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-')}.json`\n    const filepath = path.join(outputDir, filename)\n    fs.writeFileSync(filepath, JSON.stringify(result, null, 2))\n\n    console.log(`\\n💾 Resultado guardado em: ${filepath}`)\n\n    if (DRY_RUN) {\n      console.log('\\n⚠️  Este foi um DRY-RUN. process.env.MONGODB_URI || 'mongodb://localhost:27017/bo2_api'\n\n// Turmas que sabemos que devem existir (da tua lista)\nconst EXPECTED_CLASSES = [\n  { name: 'Turma 17 | 2603', classId: '3V4Vj0nn42' },\n  { name: 'Turma 8 [2a renov] + REITs | 2601', classId: 'gmeL6a6AOn' },\n  { name: 'Turma 16 | 2511', classId: 'x3ea1qr8eg' },\n  { name: 'Turma 12 [renov] + Divid + REITs | 2511', classId: ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\ninterface HotmartClass {\n  classId: string\n  className?: string\n  studentCount: number\n  studentEmails: string[]\n}\n\ninterface CurseducaGroup {\n  id: number\n  uuid: string\n  name: string\n  memberCount: number\n}\n\ninterface DiagnosticReport {\n  timestamp: string\n  hotmart: {\n    totalClassesFound: number\n {\n    totalClassesInDB: number\n    activeClasses: number\n    inactiveClasses: number\n    hotmartSyncClasses: number\n    curseducaSyncClasses: number\n    manualClasses: number\n  }\n  comparison: {\n    missingInDB: { classId: string, className?: string, source: string }[]\n    extraInDB: { classId: string, name: string }[]\n    expectedButMissing: { name: string, classId: string }[]\n AUTENTICAÇÃO\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function getHotmartAccessToken(): Promise<string> {\n  if (!HOTMART_CLIENT_ID || !HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET) {\n    throw new Error('HOTMART_CLIENT_ID e HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET são obrigatórios no .env')\n  }\n\n  const basicAuth = Buffer.from(`${HOTMART_CLIENT_ID}:${HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET}`).toString('base64')\n\n  const response = await axios.post(\n    'https://api-sec-vlc.hotmart.com/security/oauth/token',\n    new URLSearchParams({ grant_type: 'client_credentials' }),\n    {\n      headers: {\n        'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',\n        'Authorization': `Basic ${basicAuth}`\n      }\n    }\n  )\n\n  return response.data.access_token\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// HOTMART: BUSCAR TODAS AS TURMAS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function fetchAllHotmartClasses(accessToken: string): Promise<HotmartClass[]> {\n  console.log('📡 [Hotmart] Buscando todas as turmas via utilizadores...')\n\n  const classMap = new Map<string, HotmartClass>()\n  let nextPageToken: string | null = null\n  let pageCount = 0\n  let totalUsers = 0\n\n  do {\n    pageCount++\n    let requestUrl = `https://developers.hotmart.com/club/api/v1/users?subdomain=${HOTMART_SUBDOMAIN}`\n    if (nextPageToken) {\n      requestUrl += `&page_token=${encodeURIComponent(nextPageToken)}`\n    }\n\n    const response = await axios.get(requestUrl, {\n      headers: {\n        'Authorization': `Bearer ${accessToken}`,\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n      },\n      timeout: 30000\n    })\n\n    const users = response.data.users || response.data.items || response.data.data || []\n    const pageInfo = response.data.page_info || response.data.pageInfo || {}\n\n    totalUsers += users.length\n\n    for (const user of users) {\n      const classId = user.class_id?.trim()\n      const className = user.class_name?.trim()\n      const email = user.email?.trim()\n\n      if (classId) {\n        if (!classMap.has(classId)) {\n          classMap.set(classId, {\n            classId,\n            className: className || undefined,\n            studentCount: 0,\n            studentEmails: []\n          })\n        }\n\n        const cls = classMap.get(classId)!\n        cls.studentCount++\n        if (email) {\n          cls.studentEmails.push(email)\n        }\n\n        // Atualizar nome se disponível e ainda não temos\n        if (className && !cls.className) {\n          cls.className = className\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    nextPageToken = pageInfo.next_page_token || null\n\n    if (pageCount % 10 === 0) {\n      console.log(`   📄 Página ${pageCount}: ${users.length} users, ${classMap.size} turmas únicas`)\n    }\n\n    if (nextPageToken) {\n      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200))\n    }\n\n  } while (nextPageToken)\n\n  console.log(`✅ [Hotmart] Concluído: ${totalUsers} users processados, ${classMap.size} turmas encontradas`)\n\n  return Array.from(classMap.values()).sort((a, b) => b.studentCount - a.studentCount)\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// CURSEDUCA: BUSCAR TODOS OS GRUPOS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function fetchAllCurseducaGroups(): Promise<CurseducaGroup[]> {\n  console.log('📡 [CursEduca] Buscando todos os grupos...')\n\n  const headers = {\n    'Authorization': `Bearer ${CURSEDUCA_ACCESS_TOKEN}`,\n    'api_key': CURSEDUCA_API_KEY,\n    'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const response = await axios.get(`${CURSEDUCA_API_URL}/groups`, {\n      headers,\n      timeout: 30000\n    })\n\n    const groups = Array.isArray(response.data)\n      ? response.data\n      : response.data?.data || response.data?.groups || []\n\n    console.log(`✅ [CursEduca] ${groups.length} grupos encontrados`)\n\n    // Buscar contagem de membros de cada grupo\n    const groupsWithCount: CurseducaGroup[] = []\n\n    for (const group of groups) {\n      try {\n        const membersResponse = await axios.get(\n          `${CURSEDUCA_API_URL}/reports/group/members`,\n          {\n            params: { groupId: group.id, limit: 1, offset: 0 },\n            headers,\n            timeout: 10000\n          }\n        )\n\n        // Tentar obter total de várias formas\n        const totalMembers = membersResponse.data?.total ||\n                            membersResponse.data?.data?.length ||\n                            membersResponse.data?.length || 0\n\n        groupsWithCount.push({\n          id: group.id,\n          uuid: group.uuid,\n          name: group.name,\n          memberCount: totalMembers\n        })\n\n        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200))\n\n      } catch (error) {\n        groupsWithCount.push({\n          id: group.id,\n          uuid: group.uuid,\n          name: group.name,\n          memberCount: 0\n        })\n      }\n    }\n\n    return groupsWithCount\n\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    console.error('❌ [CursEduca] Erro:', error.message)\n    return []\n  }\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// Encontrar diferenças\n  const missingInDB: { classId: string, className?: string, source: string }[] = []\n\n  // Turmas Hotmart em falta\n  for (const cls of hotmartClasses) {\n    if (!dbClassIds.has(cls.classId)) {\n      missingInDB.push({\n        classId: cls.classId,\n        className: cls.className,\n        source: 'hotmart'\n      })\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Grupos CursEduca em falta\n  for (const group of curseducaGroups) {\n    if (!dbClassIds.has(group.uuid)) {\n      missingInDB.push({\n        classId: group.uuid,\n        className: group.name,\n        source: c.source === 'manual').length\n\n  // Recomendações\n  const recommendations: string[] = []\n\n  if (missingInDB.length > 0) {\n    recommendations.push(`🔴 ${missingInDB.length} turmas estão nas APIs AUTENTICAÇÃO\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function getHotmartAccessToken(): Promise<string> {\n  if (!HOTMART_CLIENT_ID || !HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET) {\n    throw new Error('HOTMART_CLIENT_ID e HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET são obrigatórios no .env')\n  }\n\n  const basicAuth = Buffer.from(`${HOTMART_CLIENT_ID}:${HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET}`).toString('base64')\n\n  const response = await axios.post(\n    'https://api-sec-vlc.hotmart.com/security/oauth/token',\n    new URLSearchParams({ grant_type: 'client_credentials' }),\n    {\n      headers: {\n        'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',\n        'Authorization': `Basic ${basicAuth}`\n      }\n    }\n  )\n\n  return response.data.access_token\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// HOTMART: BUSCAR TODAS AS TURMAS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function fetchAllHotmartClasses(accessToken: string): Promise<HotmartClass[]> {\n  console.log('📡 [Hotmart] Buscando todas as turmas via utilizadores...')\n\n  const classMap = new Map<string, HotmartClass>()\n  let nextPageToken: string | null = null\n  let pageCount = 0\n  let totalUsers = 0\n\n  do {\n    pageCount++\n    let requestUrl = `https://developers.hotmart.com/club/api/v1/users?subdomain=${HOTMART_SUBDOMAIN}`\n    if (nextPageToken) {\n      requestUrl += `&page_token=${encodeURIComponent(nextPageToken)}`\n    }\n\n    const const users = response.data.users || response.data.items || response.data.data || []\n    const pageInfo = response.data.page_info || response.data.pageInfo || {}\n\n    totalUsers += users.length\n\n (!classMap.has(classId)) {\n          classMap.set(classId, {\n            classId,\n            className: className || undefined,\n            studentCount: 0,\n            studentEmails: []\n          })\n        }\n\n        const cls = classMap.get(classId)!\n        cls.studentCount++\n        if (email) {\n          cls.studentEmails.push(email)\n        }\n\n        // Atualizar nome se disponível e ainda não temos\n        if (className && !cls.className) {\n          cls.className = className\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    nextPageToken = pageInfo.next_page_token || null\n\n    if (pageCount % 10 === 0) {\n      console.log(`   📄 Página ${pageCount}: ${users.length} users, ${classMap.size} turmas únicas`)\n    }\n\n    if (nextPageToken) {\n      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200))\n    }\n\n  } while (nextPageToken)\n\n  console.log(`✅ [Hotmart] Concluído: ${totalUsers} users processados, ${classMap.size} turmas encontradas`)\n\n  return Array.from(classMap.values()).sort((a, b) => b.studentCount - a.studentCount)\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// CURSEDUCA: BUSCAR TODOS OS GRUPOS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function fetchAllCurseducaGroups(): Promise<CurseducaGroup[]> {\n  console.log('📡 [CursEduca] Buscando todos os grupos...')\n\n response.data?.groups || []\n\n    console.log(`✅ [CursEduca] ${groups.length} grupos encontrados`)\n\n    // Buscar contagem de membros de cada grupo\n    const groupsWithCount: CurseducaGroup[] = membersResponse.data?.total ||\n                            membersResponse.data?.data?.length ||\n                            membersResponse.data?.length || 0\n\n        groupsWithCount.push({\n          id: group.id,\n          uuid: group.uuid,\n          name: group.name,\n          memberCount: totalMembers\n        })\n\n        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200))\n\n      } catch (error) {\n        groupsWithCount.push({\n          id: group.id,\n          uuid: group.uuid,\n          name: group.name,\n          memberCount: 0\n        })\n      }\n    }\n\n    return groupsWithCount\n\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    console.error('❌ [CursEduca] Erro:', error.message)\n    return []\n  }\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// DATABASE: BUSCAR TURMAS LOCAIS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function fetchDatabaseClasses(): Promise<any[]> {\n  console.log('📡 [Database] Buscando turmas locais...')\n\n  const classes = await Class.find({}).lean()\n\n  console.log(`✅ [Database] ${classes.length} turmas encontradas`)\n\n  return classes\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// MAIN: DIAGNÓSTICO\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function runDiagnostic(): Promise<DiagnosticReport> {\n  console.log('\\n' + '═'.repeat(60))\n  console.log('🔍 DIAGNÓSTICO DE SINCRONIZAÇÃO DE TURMAS')\n  console.log('═'.repeat(60) + '\\n')\n\n  // Conectar MongoDB\n  console.log('🔌 Conectando ao MongoDB...')\n  await mongoose.connect(MONGODB_URI)\n  console.log('✅ MongoDB conectado\\n')\n\n  // 1. Buscar turmas Hotmart\n  console.log('─'.repeat(40))\n  console.log('📊 PASSO 1: HOTMART')\n  console.log('─'.repeat(40))\n  const accessToken = await getHotmartAccessToken()\n  const hotmartClasses = await fetchAllHotmartClasses(accessToken)\n\n  // 2. Buscar grupos CursEduca\n  console.log('\\n' + '─'.repeat(40))\n  console.log('📊 PASSO 2: CURSEDUCA')\n  console.log('─'.repeat(40))\n  const curseducaGroups = await fetchAllCurseducaGroups()\n\n  // 3. Buscar turmas da BD\n  console.log('\\n' + '─'.repeat(40))\n  console.log('📊 PASSO 3: DATABASE')\n  console.log('─'.repeat(40))\n  const dbClasses = await fetchDatabaseClasses()\n\n  // 4. Criar conjuntos para comparação\n  const hotmartClassIds = new Set(hotmartClasses.map(c => c.classId))\n  const curseducaGroupIds = new Set(curseducaGroups.map(g => g.uuid))\n  const dbClassIds = new Set(dbClasses.map(c => c.classId))\n\n  // 5. Encontrar diferenças\n  const missingInDB: { classId: string, className?: string, source: string }[] = []\n\n  // Turmas Hotmart em falta\n  for (const cls of hotmartClasses) {\n    if (!dbClassIds.has(cls.classId)) {\n      missingInDB.push({\n        classId: cls.classId,\n        className: cls.className,\n        source: 'hotmart'\n      })\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Grupos CursEduca em falta\n  for (const group of curseducaGroups) {\n    if (!dbClassIds.has(group.uuid)) {\n      missingInDB.push({\n        classId: group.uuid,\n        className: group.name,\n        source: 'curseduca'\n      })\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Turmas na BD que não existem nas APIs\n  const extraInDB = dbClasses\n    .filter(c => !hotmartClassIds.has(c.classId) && !curseducaGroupIds.has(c.classId))\n    .map(c => ({ classId: c.classId, name: c.name }))\n\n  // Verificar turmas esperadas\n  const expectedButMissing: { name: string, classId: string }[] = []\n  const expectedAndFound: { name: string, classId: string, dbName: string }[] = []\n\n  for (const expected of EXPECTED_CLASSES) {\n    const dbClass = dbClasses.find(c => c.classId === expected.classId)\n    if (dbClass) {\n      expectedAndFound.push({\n        name: expected.name,\n        classId: expected.classId,\n        dbName: dbClass.name\n      })\n    } else {\n      expectedButMissing.push(expected)\n    }\n  }\n\n dbClasses.filter(c => c.source === 'hotmart_sync').length\n  const curseducaSyncClasses = dbClasses.filter(c => c.source === 'curseduca_sync').length\n  const manualClasses = dbClasses.filter(c => c.source === 'manual').length\n\n  // Recomendações\n  const recommendations: string[] = []\n\n  if (missingInDB.length > 0) {\n    recommendations.push(`🔴 ${missingInDB.length} turmas estão nas APIs mas NÃO na BD - precisam ser sincronizadas`)\n  }\n\n  if (expectedButMissing.length > 0) {\n    recommendations.push(`🔴 ${expectedButMissing.length} turmas esperadas NÃO estão na BD - verificar IDs`)\n  }\n\n  const classesWithoutName = dbClasses.filter(c => !c.name || c.name.startsWith('Turma '))\n  if (classesWithoutName.length > 0) {\n    recommendations.push(`🟡 ${classesWithoutName.length} turmas têm nome genérico \"Turma X\" - podem precisar de nome manual`)\n  }\n\n  if (extraInDB.length > 0) {\n    recommendations.push(`🟡 ${extraInDB.length} turmas na BD não existem nas APIs - podem ser órfãs ou manuais`)\n  }\n\n  if (hotmartClasses.length !== hotmartSyncClasses) {\n    recommendations.push(`📊 Hotmart: ${hotmartClasses.length} turmas na API vs ${hotmartSyncClasses} na BD`)\n  }\n\n  // Criar relatório\n  const report: DiagnosticReport = {\n    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    hotmart: {\n      totalClassesFound: hotmartClasses.length,\n      classesWithStudents: hotmartClasses.filter(c => c.studentCount > 0).length,\n      classesWithoutStudents: hotmartClasses.filter(c => c.studentCount === 0).length,\n      allClasses: hotmartClasses\n    },\n    curseduca: {\n      totalGroupsFound: curseducaGroups.length,\n      allGroups: curseducaGroups\n    },\n    database: {\n      totalClassesInDB: dbClasses.length,\n      activeClasses,\n      inactiveClasses,\n      hotmartSyncClasses,\n      curseducaSyncClasses,\n      manualClasses\n    },\n    comparison: {\n      missingInDB,\n      extraInDB,\n      expectedButMissing,\n      expectedAndFound\n    },\n    recommendations\n  }\n\n  return report\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// OUTPUT: ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function getHotmartAccessToken(): Promise<string> {\n  if (!HOTMART_CLIENT_ID || !HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET) {\n    throw new Error('HOTMART_CLIENT_ID e HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET são obrigatórios no .env')\n  }\n\n  const basicAuth = Buffer.from(`${HOTMART_CLIENT_ID}:${HOTMART_CLIENT_SECRET}`).toString('base64')\n\n  const response = await axios.post(\n    'https://api-sec-vlc.hotmart.com/security/oauth/token',\n    new URLSearchParams({ grant_type: 'client_credentials' }),\n    {\n      headers: {\n        'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',\n        'Authorization': `Basic ${basicAuth}`\n      }\n    }\n  )\n\n  return response.data.access_token\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// HOTMART: BUSCAR TODAS AS TURMAS COM NOMES\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function fetchAllHotmartClasses(accessToken: string): Promise<Map<string, HotmartClassData>> {\n  console.log('📡 [Hotmart] Buscando todas as turmas...')\n\n  const classMap = new Map<string, HotmartClassData>()\n  let nextPageToken: string | null = null\n  let pageCount = 0\n  let totalUsers = 0\n\n  do {\n    pageCount++\n    let requestUrl = `https://developers.hotmart.com/club/api/v1/users?subdomain=${HOTMART_SUBDOMAIN}`\n    if (nextPageToken) {\n      requestUrl += `&page_token=${encodeURIComponent(nextPageToken)}`\n    }\n\n    const response = await axios.get(requestUrl, {\n      headers: {\n        'Authorization': `Bearer ${accessToken}`,\n        'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n      },\n      timeout: 30000\n    })\n\n    const users = response.data.users || response.data.items || response.data.data || []\n    const pageInfo = response.data.page_info || response.data.pageInfo || {}\n\n    totalUsers += users.length\n\n    for (const user of users) {\n      const classId = user.class_id?.trim()\n      const className = user.class_name?.trim() || null\n\n      if (classId) {\n        if (!classMap.has(classId)) {\n          classMap.set(classId, {\n            classId,\n            className,\n            studentCount: 1\n          })\n        } else {\n          const existing = classMap.get(classId)!\n          existing.studentCount++\n\n          // Preferir nome não-nulo\n          if (className && !existing.className) {\n            existing.className = className\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    nextPageToken = pageInfo.next_page_token || null\n\n    if (pageCount % 10 === 0) {\n      console.log(`   📄 Página ${pageCount}: ${classMap.size} turmas únicas`)\n    }\n\n    if (nextPageToken) {\n      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200))\n    }\n\n  } while (nextPageToken)\n\n  console.log(`✅ [Hotmart] ${classMap.size} turmas encontradas (${totalUsers} users)`)\n\n  return classMap\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// CURSEDUCA: BUSCAR TODOS OS GRUPOS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function fetchAllCurseducaGroups(): Promise<CurseducaGroupData[]> {\n  console.log('📡 [CursEduca] Buscando todos os grupos...')\n\n  const headers = {\n    'Authorization': `Bearer ${CURSEDUCA_ACCESS_TOKEN}`,\n    'api_key': CURSEDUCA_API_KEY,\n    'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const response = await axios.get(`${CURSEDUCA_API_URL}/groups`, {\n      headers,\n      timeout: 30000\n    })\n\n    const groups = Array.isArray(response.data)\n      ? response.data\n      : response.data?.data || response.data?.groups || []\n\n    const groupsWithCount: CurseducaGroupData[] = []\n\n    for (const group of groups) {\n      try {\n        const membersResponse = await axios.get(\n          `${CURSEDUCA_API_URL}/reports/group/members`,\n          {\n            params: { groupId: group.id, limit: 1, offset: 0 },\n            headers,\n            timeout: 10000\n          }\n        )\n\n        const totalMembers = membersResponse.data?.total ||\n                            membersResponse.data?.data?.length ||\n                            membersResponse.data?.length || 0\n\n        groupsWithCount.push({\n          id: group.id,\n          uuid: group.uuid,\n          name: group.name,\n          memberCount: totalMembers\n        })\n\n        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200))\n\n      } catch (error) {\n        groupsWithCount.push({\n          id: group.id,\n          uuid: group.uuid,\n          name: group.name,\n          memberCount: 0\n        })\n      }\n    }\n\n    console.log(`✅ [CursEduca] ${groupsWithCount.length} grupos encontrados`)\n\n    return groupsWithCount\n\n  } catch (error: any) {\n    console.error('❌ [CursEduca] Erro:', error.message)\n    return []\n  }\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// SYNC: HOTMART\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function syncHotmartClasses(\n  hotmartClasses: Map<string, HotmartClassData>,\n  result: SyncResult\n): Promise<void> {\n  console.log('\\n' + '─'.repeat(40))\n  console.log('🔄 SINCRONIZANDO TURMAS HOTMART')\n  console.log('─'.repeat(40))\n\n  for (const [classId, classData] of hotmartClasses) {\n    try {\n      const existing = await Class.findOne({ classId })\n\n      if (!existing) {\n        // Criar nova turma\n        const displayName = classData.className || `Turma ${classId}`\n\n        if (!DRY_RUN) {\n          await Class.create({\n            classId,\n            name: displayName,\n            description: `Turma sincronizada da Hotmart em ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('pt-PT')}`,\n            source: 'hotmart_sync',\n            isActive: true,\n            estado: 'ativo',\n            studentCount: classData.studentCount,\n            lastSyncAt: new Date()\n          })\n        }\n\n        result.hotmart.created++\n        result.hotmart.details.push({\n          classId,\n          action: 'created',\n          newName: displayName\n        })\n\n        console.log(`   ✅ CRIADA: ${classId} - \"${displayName}\" (${classData.studentCount} alunos)`)\n\n      } else {\n        // Verificar se precisa atualizar\n        let needsUpdate = false\n        const updates: any = {\n          lastSyncAt: new Date(),\n          studentCount: classData.studentCount\n        }\n\n        // Atualizar nome se:\n        // 1. Nome atual é genérico (\"Turma X\") e temos nome real\n        // 2. FORCE_UPDATE está ativo e temos nome diferente\n        const isGenericName = existing.name.startsWith('Turma ') && existing.name.match(/^Turma [a-zA-Z0-9]+$/)\n        const hasNewName = classData.className && classData.className !== existing.name\n\n        if ((isGenericName && classData.className) || (FORCE_UPDATE && hasNewName)) {\n          updates.name = classData.className\n          needsUpdate = true\n        }\n\n        if (needsUpdate || existing.studentCount !== classData.studentCount) {\n          if (!DRY_RUN) {\n            await Class.findByIdAndUpdate(existing._id, updates)\n          }\n\n          result.hotmart.updated++\n          result.hotmart.details.push({\n            classId,\n            action: 'updated',\n            oldName: existing.name,\n            newName: updates.name || existing.name\n          })\n\n          if (updates.name) {\n            console.log(`   📝 ATUALIZADA: ${classId} - \"${existing.name}\" → \"${updates.name}\"`)\n          }\n\n        } else {\n          result.hotmart.unchanged++\n          result.hotmart.details.push({\n            classId,\n            action: 'unchanged'\n          })\n        }\n      }\n\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      result.hotmart.errors.push(`${classId}: ${error.message}`)\n      result.hotmart.details.push({\n        classId,\n        action: 'error',\n        error: error.message\n      })\n      console.log(`   ❌ ERRO: ${classId} - ${error.message}`)\n    }\n  }\n\n  console.log(`\\n   📊 Resumo Hotmart:`)\n  console.log(`      Criadas: ${result.hotmart.created}`)\n  console.log(`      Atualizadas: ${result.hotmart.updated}`)\n  console.log(`      Sem alteração: ${result.hotmart.unchanged}`)\n  console.log(`      Erros: ${result.hotmart.errors.length}`)\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// SYNC: CURSEDUCA\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function syncCurseducaGroups(\n  groups: CurseducaGroupData[],\n  result: SyncResult\n): Promise<void> {\n  console.log('\\n' + '─'.repeat(40))\n  console.log('🔄 SINCRONIZANDO GRUPOS CURSEDUCA')\n  console.log('─'.repeat(40))\n\n  for (const group of groups) {\n    try {\n      // Usar UUID como classId para CursEduca\n      const existing = await Class.findOne({\n        $or: [\n          { classId: group.uuid },\n          { curseducaUuid: group.uuid },\n          { curseducaId: String(group.id) }\n        ]\n      })\n\n      if (!existing) {\n        // Criar nova turma\n        if (!DRY_RUN) {\n          await Class.create({\n            classId: group.uuid,\n            curseducaId: String(group.id),\n            curseducaUuid: group.uuid,\n            name: group.name,\n            description: `Grupo CursEduca sincronizado em ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('pt-PT')}`,\n            source: 'curseduca_sync',\n            isActive: true,\n            estado: 'ativo',\n            studentCount: group.memberCount,\n            lastSyncAt: new Date()\n          })\n        }\n\n        result.curseduca.created++\n        result.curseduca.details.push({\n          groupId: group.uuid,\n          action: 'created',\n          name: group.name\n        })\n\n        console.log(`   ✅ CRIADO: ${group.name} (ID: ${group.id}, ${group.memberCount} membros)`)\n\n      } else {\n        // Atualizar se necessário\n        const updates: any = {\n          lastSyncAt: new Date(),\n          studentCount: group.memberCount,\n          curseducaId: String(group.id),\n          curseducaUuid: group.uuid\n        }\n\n        let needsUpdate = false\n\n        if (existing.name !== group.name && FORCE_UPDATE) {\n          updates.name = group.name\n          needsUpdate = true\n        }\n\n        if (needsUpdate || existing.studentCount !== group.memberCount) {\n          if (!DRY_RUN) {\n            await Class.findByIdAndUpdate(existing._id, updates)\n          }\n\n          result.curseduca.updated++\n          result.curseduca.details.push({\n            groupId: group.uuid,\n            action: 'updated',\n            name: group.name\n          })\n\n        } else {\n          result.curseduca.unchanged++\n          result.curseduca.details.push({\n            groupId: group.uuid,\n            action: 'unchanged',\n            name: group.name\n          })\n        }\n      }\n\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      result.curseduca.errors.push(`${group.uuid}: ${error.message}`)\n      result.curseduca.details.push({\n        groupId: group.uuid,\n        action: 'error',\n        name: group.name,\n        error: error.message\n      })\n      console.log(`   ❌ ERRO: ${group.name} - ${error.message}`)\n    }\n  }\n\n  console.log(`\\n   📊 Resumo CursEduca:`)\n  console.log(`      Criados: ${result.curseduca.created}`)\n  console.log(`      Atualizados: ${result.curseduca.updated}`)\n  console.log(`      Sem alteração: ${result.curseduca.unchanged}`)\n  console.log(`      Erros: ${result.curseduca.errors.length}`)\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// MAIN\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nasync function main() {\n  console.log('\\n' + '═'.repeat(60))\n  console.log('🔄 SINCRONIZAÇÃO DE TURMAS EM FALTA')\n  console.log('═'.repeat(60))\n\n  if (DRY_RUN) {\n    console.log('⚠️  MODO DRY-RUN: Nenhuma alteração será feita na BD')\n  }\n  if (FORCE_UPDATE) {\n    console.log('⚠️  MODO FORCE: Nomes serão atualizados mesmo se já existirem')\n  }\n\n  const result: SyncResult = {\n    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    dryRun: DRY_RUN,\n    forceUpdate: FORCE_UPDATE,\n    hotmart: {\n      totalFound: 0,\n      created: 0,\n      updated: 0,\n      unchanged: 0,\n      errors: [],\n      details: []\n    },\n    curseduca: {\n      totalFound: 0,\n      created: 0,\n      updated: 0,\n      unchanged: 0,\n      errors: [],\n      details: []\n    }\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Conectar MongoDB\n    console.log('\\n🔌 Conectando ao MongoDB...')\n    await mongoose.connect(MONGODB_URI)\n 'dry-run-' : ''}${new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-')}.json`\n    const filepath = path.join(outputDir, filename)\n    fs.writeFileSync(filepath, JSON.stringify(result, null, 2))\n\n    console.log(`\\n💾 Resultado guardado em: ${filepath}`)\n\n    if (DRY_RUN) {\n      console.log('\\n⚠️  Este foi um DRY-RUN. O endpoint `syncHotmartClasses` tem uma limitação:**\n- Extrai turmas **apenas dos utilizadores existentes** (via `user.class_id`)\n- Se uma turma não tem alunos atualmente, **não é criada**\n- O campo `class_name` da API Hotmart é usado, mas muitas vezes vem vazio\n\n**2. tentativa: default\n   244→    if (useCache) {\n   245→      const allCurseduca = Array.from(PRODUCTS_CACHE!.values()).find(p => p.platform === 'curseduca')\n   246→      if (allCurseduca) {\n   247→
