 252→    const defaultProduct = await Product.findOne({\n   253→      platform: 'curseduca',\n   254→      isActive: true\n   255→    }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n   256→\n   257→    if (defaultProduct) {\n   258→      console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Usando produto default CursEDuca: ${defaultProduct.code} (groupId: ${groupId})`)\n   259→      return defaultProduct._id\n   260→    }\n   261→\n   262→    console.error(`❌ [ProductMapping] Nenhum produto CursEDuca ativo encontrado!`)\n   263→    return null\n   264→  }\n   265→\n   266→  if (syncType === 'discord') {\n   267→    // Cache lookup\n   268→    if (useCache) {\n   269→      const cached = PRODUCTS_CACHE!.get('DISCORD_COMMUNITY') ||\n   270→                     Array.from(PRODUCTS_CACHE!.values()).find(p => p.platform === 'discord')\n   271→      if (cached) {\n   272→        debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto Discord do cache: ${cached.code}`)\n   273→        return cached._id\n   274→      }\n   275→    }\n   276→\n   277→    // Fallback: query BD\n   278→    const product = await Product.findOne({\n   279→      $or: [\n   280→        { code: 'DISCORD_COMMUNITY' },\n   281→        { platform: 'discord', isActive: true }\n   282→      ]\n   283→    }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n   284→\n   285→    if (!product) {\n   286→      console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Produto Discord não encontrado`)\n   287→    }\n   288→\n   289→    return product?._id || null\n   290→  }\n   291→\n   292→  return null\n   293→}\n   294→\n   295→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   296→// MAIN SYNC FUNCTION\n   297→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   298→\n   299→export const executeUniversalSync = async (\n   300→  config: UniversalSyncConfig\n   301→): Promise<UniversalSyncResult> => {\n   302→  console.log('🚀 [UniversalSync] Iniciando sync:', config.jobName)\n   303→  console.log(`   📊 Tipo: ${config.syncType}`)\n   304→  console.log(`   🎯 Trigger: ${config.triggeredBy}`)\n   305→  console.log(`   📦 Batch Size: ${config.batchSize}`)\n   306→\n   307→  const startTime = Date.now()\n   308→\n   309→  let reportId: string | null = null\n   310→  let syncHistoryId: string | null = null\n   311→\n   312→  const stats = {\n   313→    total: 0,\n   314→    inserted: 0,\n   315→    updated: 0,\n   316→    errors: 0,\n   317→    skipped: 0,\n   318→    unchanged: 0\n   319→  }\n   320→\n   321→  const errors: SyncError[] = []\n   322→  const warnings: SyncWarning[] = []\n   323→\n   324→  let rid = ''\n   325→  let hid = ''\n   326→\n   327→  try {\n   328→    // ✅ OTIMIZAÇÃO FASE 1: Pre-load cache de produtos\n   329→    await preloadProductsCache()\n   330→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   331→    // STEP 1: CRIAR SYNCREPORT\n   332→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   333→\n   334→    const report = await syncReportsService.createSyncReport({\n   335→      jobId: config.jobId,\n   336→      jobName: config.jobName,\n   337→      syncType: config.syncType,\n   338→      triggeredBy: config.triggeredBy,\n   339→      triggeredByUser: config.triggeredByUser,\n   340→      syncConfig: {\n   341→        fullSync: config.fullSync,\n   342→        includeProgress: config.includeProgress,\n   343→        includeTags: config.includeTags,\n   344→        batchSize: config.batchSize\n   345→      }\n   346→    })\n   347→\n   348→    rid = getDocId(report, 'SyncReport')\n   349→    reportId = rid\n   350→\n   351→    console.log(`✅ [UniversalSync] Report criado: ${rid}`)\n   352→\n   353→    await syncReportsService.addReportLog(rid, 'info', `Iniciando sincronização ${config.syncType}`, {\n   354→      fullSync: config.fullSync,\n   355→      batchSize: config.batchSize,\n   356→      dataSourceSize: Array.isArray(config.sourceData) ? config.sourceData.length : 1\n   357→    })\n   358→\n   359→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   360→    // STEP 2: CRIAR SYNCHISTORY\n   361→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   362→\n   363→    const syncHistory = await SyncHistory.create({\n   364→      type: config.syncType,\n   365→      status: 'running',\n   366→      startedAt: new Date(),\n   367→      stats: {\n   368→        total: 0,\n   369→        added: 0,\n   370→        updated: 0,\n   371→        conflicts: 0,\n   372→        errors: 0\n   373→      },\n   374→      user: config.triggeredByUser || undefined,\n   375→      triggeredBy: {\n   376→        type: config.triggeredBy,\n   377→        userId: config.triggeredByUser,\n   378→        cronJobId: config.jobId\n   379→      }\n   380→    })\n   381→\n   382→    hid = getDocId(syncHistory, 'SyncHistory')\n   383→    syncHistoryId = hid\n   384→\n   385→    console.log(`✅ [UniversalSync] SyncHistory criado: ${hid}`)\n   386→\n   387→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   388→    // STEP 3: PROCESSAR DADOS\n   389→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   390→\n   391→    await syncReportsService.addReportLog(rid, 'info', 'Processando dados da fonte...')\n   392→\n   393→    const sourceArray = Array.isArray(config.sourceData) ? config.sourceData : [config.sourceData]\n   394→    stats.total = sourceArray.length\n   395→\n   396→    for (let i = 0; i < sourceArray.length; i += config.batchSize) {\n   397→      const batch = sourceArray.slice(i, i + config.batchSize)\n   398→      const batchNumber = Math.floor(i / config.batchSize) + 1\n   399→      const totalBatches = Math.ceil(sourceArray.length / config.batchSize)\n   400→\n   401→      console.log(`📦 [UniversalSync] Processando batch ${batchNumber}/${totalBatches} (${batch.length} itens)`)\n   402→\n   403→      await syncReportsService.addReportLog(\n   404→        rid,\n   405→        'info',\n   406→        `Processando batch ${batchNumber}/${totalBatches}`,\n   407→        { batchSize: batch.length, startIndex: i }\n   408→      )\n   409→\n   410→      for (let j = 0; j < batch.length; j++) {\n   411→        const item = batch[j]\n   412→\n   413→        try {\n   414→          const result = await processSyncItem(item, config)\n   415→\n   416→          if (result.action === 'inserted') stats.inserted++\n   417→          else if (result.action === 'updated') stats.updated++\n   418→          else if (result.action === 'unchanged') stats.unchanged++\n   419→          else if (result.action === 'skipped') stats.skipped++\n   420→\n   421→          if (config.onProgress) {\n   422→            const current = i + j + 1\n   423→            config.onProgress({\n   424→              current,\n   425→              total: stats.total,\n   426→              percentage: (current / stats.total) * 100,\n   427→              message: `Processando ${current}/${stats.total}`\n   428→            })\n   429→          }\n   430→        } catch (err: unknown) {\n   431→          stats.errors++\n   432→\n   433→          const e = err as { message?: unknown; stack?: unknown; code?: unknown }\n   434→          const message = typeof e.message === 'string' ? e.message : 'Erro desconhecido'\n   435→\n   436→          const syncError: SyncError = {\n   437→            message,\n   438→            userId:\n   439→              (typeof item.id === 'string' ? item.id : undefined) ||\n   440→              (typeof item.userId === 'string' ? item.userId : undefined),\n   441→            userEmail: item.email,\n   442→            stack: typeof e.stack === 'string' ? e.stack : undefined,\n   443→            code: typeof e.code === 'string' ? e.code : undefined\n   444→          }\n   445→\n   446→          errors.push(syncError)\n   447→\n   448→          await syncReportsService.addReportError(\n   449→            rid,\n   450→            syncError.message,\n   451→            syncError.userId,\n   452→            syncError.userEmail,\n   453→            syncError.stack\n   454→          )\n   455→\n   456→          if (config.onError) config.onError(syncError)\n   457→\n   458→          console.error('❌ [UniversalSync] Erro ao processar item:', syncError.message)\n   459→        }\n   460→      }\n   461→\n   462→      if (i + config.batchSize < sourceArray.length) {\n   463→        await new Promise<void>(resolve => {\n   464→          setTimeout(() => resolve(), 100)\n   465→        })\n   466→      }\n   467→    }\n   468→\n   469→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   470→    // STEP 4: ATUALIZAR STATS\n   471→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   472→\n   473→    await syncReportsService.updateReportStats(rid, stats)\n   474→\n   475→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   476→    // STEP 5: FINALIZAR REPORT\n   477→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   478→\n   479→    const finalStatus =\n   480→      stats.errors > 0 ? (stats.errors === stats.total ? 'failed' : 'partial') : 'success'\n   481→\n   482→    await syncReportsService.completeReport(rid, finalStatus)\n   483→\n   484→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   485→    // STEP 6: FINALIZAR SYNCHISTORY\n   486→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   487→\n   488→    const completedAt = new Date()\n   489→    const durationSeconds = Math.floor((completedAt.getTime() - new Date(syncHistory.startedAt).getTime()) / 1000)\n   490→\n   491→    await SyncHistory.findByIdAndUpdate(syncHistoryId, {\n   492→      status: 'completed',\n   493→      completedAt,\n   494→      'stats.total': stats.total,\n   495→      'stats.added': stats.inserted,\n   496→      'stats.updated': stats.updated,\n   497→      'stats.errors': stats.errors,\n   498→      duration: durationSeconds,\n   499→      'metrics.duration': durationSeconds,\n   500→      'metrics.usersPerSecond': durationSeconds > 0 ? stats.total / durationSeconds : 0,\n   501→      'metrics.avgTimePerUser': stats.total > 0 ? (durationSeconds * 1000) / stats.total : 0\n   502→    })\n   503→\n   504→    console.log(`✅ [UniversalSync] SyncHistory finalizado: ${syncHistoryId}`)\n   505→\n   506→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   507→    // STEP 7: CALCULAR DURAÇÃO E RETORNAR\n   508→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   509→\n   510→    const duration = Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)\n   511→\n   512→    console.log('✅ [UniversalSync] Sync concluída!')\n   513→    console.log(`   ⏱️ Duração: ${duration}s`)\n   514→    console.log(`   📊 Stats: ${stats.inserted} novos, ${stats.updated} atualizados, ${stats.errors} erros`)\n   515→\n   516→    return {\n   517→      success: finalStatus !== 'failed',\n   518→      reportId: rid,\n   519→      syncHistoryId: hid,\n   520→      stats,\n   521→      duration,\n   522→      errors,\n   523→      warnings\n   524→    }\n   525→  } catch (err: unknown) {\n   526→    const e = err as { message?: unknown; stack?: unknown }\n   527→    const message = typeof e.message === 'string' ? e.message : 'Erro desconhecido'\n   528→    const stack = typeof e.stack === 'string' ? e.stack : undefined\n   529→\n   530→    console.error('❌ [UniversalSync] Erro fatal:', message)\n   531→\n   532→    if (reportId) {\n   533→      await syncReportsService.addReportError(\n   534→        reportId,\n   535→        `Erro fatal: ${message}`,\n   536→        undefined,\n   537→        undefined,\n   538→        stack\n   539→      )\n   540→      await syncReportsService.completeReport(reportId, 'failed')\n   541→    }\n   542→\n   543→    if (syncHistoryId) {\n   544→      const errorTime = new Date()\n   545→      const durationSeconds = Math.floor((errorTime.getTime() - new Date().getTime()) / 1000)\n   546→      \n   547→      await SyncHistory.findByIdAndUpdate(syncHistoryId, {\n   548→        status: 'failed',\n   549→        completedAt: errorTime,\n   550→        duration: durationSeconds,\n   551→        $push: { errorDetails: message },\n   552→        'stats.total': stats.total,\n   553→        'stats.added': stats.inserted,\n   554→        'stats.updated': stats.updated,\n   555→        'stats.errors': stats.errors + 1\n   556→      })\n   557→    }\n   558→\n   559→    throw err\n   560→  }\n   561→}\n   562→\n   563→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   564→// HELPER: PROCESS SINGLE ITEM\n   565→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   566→\n   567→const processSyncItem = async (\n   568→  item: UniversalSourceItem,\n   569→  config: UniversalSyncConfig\n   570→): Promise<ProcessItemResult> => {\n   571→  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   572→  // VALIDAÇÃO INICIAL\n   573→  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   574→  if (!item.email || !item.email.trim()) {\n   575→    throw new Error('Item sem email')\n   576→  }\n   577→\n   578→  const email = normalizeEmail(item.email)\n   579→  const name = item.name && item.name.trim() ? item.name.trim() : email\n   580→\n   581→  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   582→  // BUSCAR OU CRIAR USER\n   583→  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   584→  let user = await User.findOne({ email })\n   585→  const isNew = !user\n   586→\n   587→  if (!user) {\n   588→    user = await User.create({\n   589→      email,\n   590→      name,\n   591→      isActive: true\n   592→    })\n   593→    console.log(`✨ [UniversalSync] Novo user criado: ${user.email}`)\n   594→  }\n   595→\n   596→  const userIdStr = String(user._id)\n   597→\n   598→  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   599→  // PREPARAR UPDATES DO USER\n   600→  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   601→  const updateFields: Record<string, unknown> = {}\n   602→  let needsUpdate = false\n   603→\n   604→  if (name && user.name !== name) {\n   605→    updateFields.name = name\n   606→    needsUpdate = true\n   607→  }\n   608→\n   609→  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   610→  // ✅ HOTMART - VERSÃO COMPLETA (MANTÉM TUDO!)\n   611→  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   612→  if (config.syncType === 'hotmart') {\n   613→    // IDs\n   614→    if (item.hotmartUserId) {\n   615→      updateFields['hotmart.hotmartUserId'] = item.hotmartUserId\n   616→      needsUpdate = true\n   617→    }\n   618→\n   619→    // ✅ DATAS (TODAS!)\n   620→    const purchaseDate = toDateOrNull(item.purchaseDate)\n   621→    const signupDate = toDateOrNull(item.signupDate)\n   622→    const firstAccessDate = toDateOrNull(item.firstAccessDate)\n   623→    const lastAccessDate = toDateOrNull(item.lastAccessDate)\n   624→\n   625→    if (purchaseDate) {\n   626→      updateFields['hotmart.purchaseDate'] = purchaseDate\n   627→      needsUpdate = true\n   628→    }\n   629→    if (signupDate) {\n   630→      updateFields['hotmart.signupDate'] = signupDate\n   631→      needsUpdate = true\n   632→    }\n   633→    if (firstAccessDate) {\n   634→      updateFields['hotmart.firstAccessDate'] = firstAccessDate\n   635→      needsUpdate = true\n   636→    }\n   637→    if (lastAccessDate) {\n   638→      updateFields['hotmart.lastAccessDate'] = lastAccessDate\n   639→      needsUpdate = true\n   640→    }\n   641→\n   642→    // Status\n   643→    if (item.plusAccess) {\n   644→      updateFields['hotmart.plusAccess'] = item.plusAccess\n   645→      needsUpdate = true\n   646→    }\n   647→\n   648→    // Current Module\n   649→    if (item.currentModule !== undefined) {\n   650→      updateFields['hotmart.currentModule'] = toNumber(item.currentModule, 0)\n   651→      needsUpdate = true\n   652→    }\n   653→if (lastAccessDate) {\n   654→  updateFields['hotmart.lastAccessDate'] = lastAccessDate\n   655→  needsUpdate = true\n   656→}\n   657→    // Turmas\n   658→    if (item.classId) {\n   659→      updateFields['hotmart.enrolledClasses'] = [\n   660→        {\n   661→          classId: item.classId,\n   662→          className: item.className || `Turma ${item.classId}`,\n   663→          source: 'hotmart',\n   664→          isActive: true,\n   665→          enrolledAt: purchaseDate || new Date()\n   666→        }\n   667→      ]\n   668→      needsUpdate = true\n   669→    }\n   670→\n   671→    // Metadata\n   672→    updateFields['hotmart.lastSyncAt'] = new Date()\n   673→    updateFields['hotmart.syncVersion'] = '3.0'\n   674→    updateFields['metadata.updatedAt'] = new Date()\n   675→    updateFields['metadata.sources.hotmart.lastSync'] = new Date()\n   676→    updateFields['metadata.sources.hotmart.version'] = '3.0'\n   677→    needsUpdate = true\n   678→  }\n   679→\n   680→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   681→// ✅ CURSEDUCA - VERSÃO COMPLETA COM TODOS OS CAMPOS NOVOS\n   682→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   683→  if (config.syncType === 'curseduca') {\n   684→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   685→    // IDs\n   686→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   687→    if (item.curseducaUserId && item.curseducaUserId !== (user as any).curseduca?.curseducaUserId) {\n   688→      updateFields['curseduca.curseducaUserId'] = item.curseducaUserId\n   689→      needsUpdate = true\n   690→    }\n   691→\n   692→    if (item.curseducaUuid) {\n   693→      updateFields['curseduca.curseducaUuid'] = item.curseducaUuid\n   694→      needsUpdate = true\n   695→    }\n   696→\n   697→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   698→    // 🆕 NOVO: enrollmentsCount (quantos produtos o user tem)\n   699→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   700→    if (item.platformData?.enrollmentsCount !== undefined) {\n   701→      updateFields['curseduca.enrollmentsCount'] = item.platformData.enrollmentsCount\n   702→      needsUpdate = true\n   703→    }\n   704→\n   705→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   706→    // GRUPOS\n   707→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   708→    if (item.groupId) {\n   709→      updateFields['curseduca.groupId'] = String(item.groupId)\n   710→      needsUpdate = true\n   711→    }\n   712→\n   713→    if (item.groupName) {\n   714→      updateFields['curseduca.groupName'] = item.groupName\n   715→      needsUpdate = true\n   716→    }\n   717→\n   718→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   719→    // SUBSCRIPTION TYPE\n   720→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   721→    if (item.subscriptionType) {\n   722→      updateFields['curseduca.subscriptionType'] = item.subscriptionType\n   723→      needsUpdate = true\n   724→    }\n   725→\n   726→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   727→    // 🆕 NOVO: Situation (ACTIVE/INACTIVE/SUSPENDED)\n   728→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   729→    if (item.platformData?.situation) {\n   730→      updateFields['curseduca.situation'] = item.platformData.situation\n   731→      needsUpdate = true\n   732→    }\n   733→\n   734→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   735→    // MEMBER STATUS (retrocompatibilidade)\n   736→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   737→    updateFields['curseduca.memberStatus'] = 'ACTIVE'\n   738→    needsUpdate = true\n   739→\n   740→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   741→    // DATAS\n   742→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   743→    \n   744→    // lastAccess (retrocompatibilidade)\n   745→    const lastAccess = toDateOrNull(item.lastAccess)\n   746→    if (lastAccess) {\n   747→      updateFields['curseduca.lastAccess'] = lastAccess\n   748→      needsUpdate = true\n   749→    }\n   750→\n   751→    // 🆕 NOVO: lastLogin (do endpoint /members/{id})\n   752→    const lastLogin = toDateOrNull(item.lastLogin)\n   753→    if (lastLogin) {\n   754→      updateFields['curseduca.lastLogin'] = lastLogin\n   755→      needsUpdate = true\n   756→    }\n   757→\n   758→    // 🆕 NOVO: enrolledAt → joinedDate\n   759→    const enrolledAt = toDateOrNull(item.enrolledAt)\n   760→    if (enrolledAt) {\n   761→      updateFields['curseduca.joinedDate'] = enrolledAt\n   762→      needsUpdate = true\n   763→    }\n   764→\n   765→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   766→    // PROGRESSO\n   767→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   768→    if (item.progress?.percentage !== undefined) {\n   769→      updateFields['curseduca.progress.estimatedProgress'] = toNumber(item.progress.percentage, 0)\n   770→      needsUpdate = true\n   771→    }\n   772→\n   773→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   774→    // METADATA DE SYNC\n   775→    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   776→    updateFields['curseduca.lastSyncAt'] = new Date()\n   777→    updateFields['curseduca.syncVersion'] = '3.1'  // ✅ Versão atualizada\n   778→    updateFields['metadata.updatedAt'] = new Date()\n   779→    updateFields['metadata.sources.curseduca.lastSync'] = new Date()\n   780→    updateFields['metadata.sources.curseduca.version'] = '3.1'\n   781→    needsUpdate = true\n   782→  }\n   783→\n   784→  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   785→  // DISCORD - Schema Segregado\n   786→  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n   787→  if (config.syncType === 'discord') {\n   788→    if (item.discordUserId) {\n   789→      updateFields['discord.discordIds'] = [item.discordUserId]\n   790→      needsUpdate = true\n   791→    }\n   792→\n   793→    if (item.username) {\n   794→      updateFields['discord.username'] = item.username\n   795→      needsUpdate = true\n   796→    }\n   797→\n   798→    if (item.roles) {\n   799→      updateFields['discord.roles'] = item.roles\n   800→      needsUpdate = true\n   801→ instanceof Date) return Number.isNaN(value.getTime()) ? null : value\n  if (typeof value === 'string' || typeof value === 'number') {\n    const d = new Date(value)\n    return Number.isNaN(d.getTime()) ? null : d\n  }\n  return null\n}\n\nconst toNumber = (value: unknown, fallback = 0): number => {\n  if (typeof value === 'number') return Number.isFinite(value) ? value : fallback\n  if (typeof value === 'string') {\n    const n = Number(value)\n    return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : fallback\n  }\n  return fallback\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// ✅ CACHE GLOBAL DE PRODUTOS (OTIMIZAÇÃO FASE 1)\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nlet PRODUCTS_CACHE: Map<string, LeanProduct> | null = null\nlet PRODUCTS_CACHE_TIMESTAMP: number = 0\nconst CACHE_TTL = 5 * 60 * 1000 // 5 minutos\n\n/**\n * Pre-load produtos no cache (chamado no início do sync)\n */\nasync function preloadProductsCache(): Promise<void> {\n  const now = Date.now()\n\n  // Se cache válido, reutilizar\n  if (PRODUCTS_CACHE && (now - PRODUCTS_CACHE_TIMESTAMP) < CACHE_TTL) {\n    debugLog(`✅ [ProductCache] Cache válido (${Math.floor((now - PRODUCTS_CACHE_TIMESTAMP) / 1000)}s)`)\n    return\n  }\n\n  debugLog(`📦 [ProductCache] Carregando produtos...`)\n  const start = Date.now()\n\n  const products = await Product.find({ isActive: true })\n    .select('_id code platform curseducaGroupId platformData name')\n    .lean() as unknown as LeanProduct[]\n\n  PRODUCTS_CACHE = new Map()\n\n  for (const p of products) {\n    // Key: code\n    PRODUCTS_CACHE.set(p.code, p)\n\n    // Key: platform:code\n    PRODUCTS_CACHE.set(`${p.platform}:${p.code}`, p)\n\n    // Key (CursEduca): group_{groupId}\n    if (p.platform === 'curseduca' && (p as any).curseducaGroupId) {\n      PRODUCTS_CACHE.set(`group_${(p as any).curseducaGroupId}`, p)\n    }\n  }\n\n  PRODUCTS_CACHE_TIMESTAMP = now\n\n  debugLog(`✅ [ProductCache] ${products.length} produtos carregados em ${Date.now() - start}ms`)\n}\n\n/**\n * Limpar cache (útil para testes)\n */\nexport function clearProductsCache(): void {\n  PRODUCTS_CACHE = null\n  PRODUCTS_CACHE_TIMESTAMP = 0\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// ✅ NOVO: MAPEAMENTO DINÂMICO DE PRODUTOS (COM CACHE!)\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n/**\n * Determina o produto correto baseado nos dados do item e na plataforma\n * ✅ OTIMIZADO: Usa cache quando disponível\n */\nasync function determineProductId(\n  item: UniversalSourceItem,\n  syncType: SyncType\n): Promise<mongoose.Types.ObjectId | null> {\n\n  // ✅ Usar cache se disponível\n  const useCache = PRODUCTS_CACHE !== null\n\n  if (syncType === 'hotmart') {\n    const productCode = item.productCode || 'OGI_V1'\n\n    // Cache lookup\n    if (useCache) {\n      const cached = PRODUCTS_CACHE!.get(`hotmart:${productCode}`) || PRODUCTS_CACHE!.get(productCode)\n      if (cached) {\n        debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto Hotmart do cache: ${productCode}`)\n        return cached._id\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Fallback: query BD\n    const product = await Product.findOne({\n      code: productCode,\n      platform: 'hotmart',\n      isActive: true\n    }).select('_id').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n    if (!product) {\n      console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Produto Hotmart não encontrado: ${productCode}`)\n    }\n\n    return product?._id || null\n  }\n\n  if (syncType === 'curseduca') {\n    const groupId = String(item.groupId || '')\n\n    if (groupId) {\n      // Cache lookup por groupId\n      if (useCache) {\n        const cached = PRODUCTS_CACHE!.get(`group_${groupId}`)\n        if (cached) {\n          debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto CursEduca do cache (groupId ${groupId}): ${cached.code}`)\n          return cached._id\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Fallback: query BD\n      const product = await Product.findOne({\n        platform: 'curseduca',\n        curseducaGroupId: groupId,\n        isActive: true\n      }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n      if (product) {\n        debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto encontrado por groupId ${groupId}: ${product.code}`)\n        return product._id\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 2ª tentativa: subscriptionType\n    if (item.subscriptionType) {\n      const productCode =\n        item.subscriptionType === 'MONTHLY' ? 'CLAREZA_MENSAL' :\n        item.subscriptionType === 'ANNUAL' ? 'CLAREZA_ANUAL' :\n        null\n\n      if (productCode) {\n        // Cache lookup\n        if (useCache) {\n          const cached = PRODUCTS_CACHE!.get(productCode)\n          if (cached) {\n            debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto do cache (subscriptionType): ${productCode}`)\n            return cached._id\n          }\n        }\n\n        // Fallback: query BD\n        const product = await Product.findOne({\n          platform: 'curseduca',\n          code: productCode,\n          isActive: true\n        }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n        if (product) {\n          debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto encontrado por subscriptionType ${item.subscriptionType}: ${product.code}`)\n          return product._id\n        }\n\n        console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Produto não encontrado para subscriptionType: ${item.subscriptionType} (${productCode})`)\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 3ª tentativa: groupName (não usa cache - query dinâmica)\n    if (item.groupName) {\n      const product = await Product.findOne({\n        platform: 'curseduca',\n        name: { $regex: new RegExp(item.groupName, 'i') },\n        isActive: true\n      }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n      if (product) {\n        console.log(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto encontrado por groupName \"${item.groupName}\": ${product.code}`)\n        return product._id\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 4ª tentativa: default\n    if (useCache) {\n      const allCurseduca = Array.from(PRODUCTS_CACHE!.values()).find(p => p.platform === 'curseduca')\n      if (allCurseduca) {\n        console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Usando produto default CursEDuca: ${allCurseduca.code} (groupId: ${groupId})`)\n        return allCurseduca._id\n      }\n    }\n\n    const defaultProduct = await Product.findOne({\n      platform: 'curseduca',\n      isActive: true\n    }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n    if (defaultProduct) {\n      console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Usando produto default CursEDuca: ${defaultProduct.code} (groupId: ${groupId})`)\n      return defaultProduct._id\n    }\n\n    console.error(`❌ [ProductMapping] Nenhum produto CursEDuca ativo encontrado!`)\n    return null\n  }\n\n  if (syncType === 'discord') {\n    // Cache lookup\n    if (useCache) {\n      const cached = PRODUCTS_CACHE!.get('DISCORD_COMMUNITY') ||\n                     Array.from(PRODUCTS_CACHE!.values()).find(p => p.platform === 'discord')\n      if (cached) {\n        debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto Discord do cache: ${cached.code}`)\n        return cached._id\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Fallback: query BD\n    const product = await Product.findOne({\n      $or: [\n        { code: 'DISCORD_COMMUNITY' },\n        { platform: 'discord', isActive: true }\n      ]\n    }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n    if (!product) {\n      console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Produto Discord não encontrado`)\n    }\n\n    return product?._id || null\n  }\n\n  return null\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// MAIN SYNC FUNCTION\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nexport const executeUniversalSync = async (\n  config: UniversalSyncConfig\n): Promise<UniversalSyncResult> => {\n  console.log('🚀 [UniversalSync] Iniciando sync:', config.jobName)\n  console.log(`   📊 Tipo: ${config.syncType}`)\n  console.log(`   🎯 Trigger: ${config.triggeredBy}`)\n  console.log(`   📦 Batch Size: ${config.batchSize}`)\n\n  const startTime = Date.now()\n\n  let reportId: string | null = null\n  let syncHistoryId: string | null = null\n\n  const stats = {\n    total: 0,\n    inserted: 0,\n    updated: 0,\n    errors: 0,\n    skipped: 0,\n    unchanged: 0\n  }\n\n  const errors: SyncError[] = []\n  const warnings: SyncWarning[] = []\n\n  let rid = ''\n  let hid = ''\n\n  try {\n    // ✅ OTIMIZAÇÃO FASE 1: Pre-load cache de produtos\n    await preloadProductsCache()\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 1: CRIAR SYNCREPORT\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    const report = await syncReportsService.createSyncReport({\n      jobId: config.jobId,\n      jobName: config.jobName,\n      syncType: config.syncType,\n      triggeredBy: config.triggeredBy,\n      triggeredByUser: config.triggeredByUser,\n      syncConfig: {\n        fullSync: config.fullSync,\n        includeProgress: config.includeProgress,\n        includeTags: config.includeTags,\n        batchSize: config.batchSize\n      }\n    })\n\n    rid = getDocId(report, 'SyncReport')\n    reportId = rid\n\n    console.log(`✅ [UniversalSync] Report criado: ${rid}`)\n\n    await syncReportsService.addReportLog(rid, 'info', `Iniciando sincronização ${config.syncType}`, {\n      fullSync: config.fullSync,\n      batchSize: config.batchSize,\n      dataSourceSize: Array.isArray(config.sourceData) ? config.sourceData.length : 1\n    })\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 2: CRIAR SYNCHISTORY\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    const syncHistory = await SyncHistory.create({\n      type: config.syncType,\n      status: 'running',\n      startedAt: new Date(),\n      stats: {\n        total: 0,\n        added: 0,\n        updated: 0,\n        conflicts: 0,\n        errors: 0\n      },\n      user: config.triggeredByUser || undefined,\n      triggeredBy: {\n        type: config.triggeredBy,\n        userId: config.triggeredByUser,\n        cronJobId: config.jobId\n      }\n    })\n\n    hid = getDocId(syncHistory, 'SyncHistory')\n    syncHistoryId = hid\n\n    console.log(`✅ [UniversalSync] SyncHistory criado: ${hid}`)\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 3: PROCESSAR DADOS\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    await syncReportsService.addReportLog(rid, 'info', 'Processando dados da fonte...')\n\n    const sourceArray = Array.isArray(config.sourceData) ? config.sourceData : [config.sourceData]\n    stats.total = sourceArray.length\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < sourceArray.length; i += config.batchSize) {\n      const batch = sourceArray.slice(i, i + config.batchSize)\n      const batchNumber = Math.floor(i / config.batchSize) + 1\n      const totalBatches = Math.ceil(sourceArray.length / config.batchSize)\n\n      console.log(`📦 [UniversalSync] Processando batch ${batchNumber}/${totalBatches} (${batch.length} itens)`)\n\n      await syncReportsService.addReportLog(\n        rid,\n        'info',\n        `Processando batch ${batchNumber}/${totalBatches}`,\n        { batchSize: batch.length, startIndex: i }\n      )\n\n      for (let j = 0; j < batch.length; j++) {\n        const item = batch[j]\n\n        try {\n          const result = await processSyncItem(item, config)\n\n          if (result.action === 'inserted') stats.inserted++\n          else if (result.action === 'updated') stats.updated++\n          else if (result.action === 'unchanged') stats.unchanged++\n          else if (result.action === 'skipped') stats.skipped++\n\n          if (config.onProgress) {\n            const current = i + j + 1\n            config.onProgress({\n              current,\n              total: stats.total,\n              percentage: (current / stats.total) * 100,\n              message: `Processando ${current}/${stats.total}`\n            })\n          }\n        } catch (err: unknown) {\n          stats.errors++\n\n          const e = err as { message?: unknown; stack?: unknown; code?: unknown }\n          const message = typeof e.message === 'string' ? e.message : 'Erro desconhecido'\n\n          const syncError: SyncError = {\n            message,\n            userId:\n              (typeof item.id === 'string' ? item.id : undefined) ||\n              (typeof item.userId === 'string' ? item.userId : undefined),\n            userEmail: item.email,\n            stack: typeof e.stack === 'string' ? e.stack : undefined,\n            code: typeof e.code === 'string' ? e.code : undefined\n          }\n\n          errors.push(syncError)\n\n          await syncReportsService.addReportError(\n            rid,\n            syncError.message,\n            syncError.userId,\n            syncError.userEmail,\n            syncError.stack\n          )\n\n          if (config.onError) config.onError(syncError)\n\n          console.error('❌ [UniversalSync] Erro ao processar item:', syncError.message)\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (i + config.batchSize < sourceArray.length) {\n        await new Promise<void>(resolve => {\n          setTimeout(() => resolve(), 100)\n        })\n      }\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 4: ATUALIZAR STATS\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    await syncReportsService.updateReportStats(rid, stats)\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 5: FINALIZAR REPORT\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    const finalStatus =\n      stats.errors > 0 ? (stats.errors === stats.total ? 'failed' : 'partial') : 'success'\n\n    await syncReportsService.completeReport(rid, finalStatus)\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 6: FINALIZAR SYNCHISTORY\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    const completedAt = new Date()\n    const durationSeconds = Math.floor((completedAt.getTime() - new Date(syncHistory.startedAt).getTime()) / 1000)\n\n    await SyncHistory.findByIdAndUpdate(syncHistoryId, {\n      status: 'completed',\n      completedAt,\n      'stats.total': stats.total,\n      'stats.added': stats.inserted,\n      'stats.updated': stats.updated,\n      'stats.errors': stats.errors,\n      duration: durationSeconds,\n      'metrics.duration': durationSeconds,\n      'metrics.usersPerSecond': durationSeconds > 0 ? stats.total / durationSeconds : 0,\n      'metrics.avgTimePerUser': stats.total > 0 ? (durationSeconds * 1000) / stats.total : 0\n    })\n\n    console.log(`✅ [UniversalSync] SyncHistory finalizado: ${syncHistoryId}`)\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 7: CALCULAR DURAÇÃO E RETORNAR\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    const duration = Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)\n\n    console.log('✅ [UniversalSync] Sync concluída!')\n    console.log(`   ⏱️ Duração: ${duration}s`)\n    console.log(`   📊 Stats: ${stats.inserted} novos, ${stats.updated} atualizados, ${stats.errors} erros`)\n\n    return {\n      success: finalStatus !== 'failed',\n      reportId: rid,\n      syncHistoryId: hid,\n      stats,\n      duration,\n      errors,\n      warnings\n    }\n  } catch (err: unknown) {\n    const e = err as { message?: unknown; stack?: unknown }\n    const message = typeof e.message === 'string' ? e.message : 'Erro desconhecido'\n    const stack = typeof e.stack === 'string' ? e.stack : undefined\n\n    console.error('❌ [UniversalSync] Erro fatal:', message)\n\n    if (reportId) {\n      await syncReportsService.addReportError(\n        reportId,\n        `Erro fatal: ${message}`,\n        undefined,\n        undefined,\n        stack\n      )\n      await syncReportsService.completeReport(reportId, 'failed')\n    }\n\n    if (syncHistoryId) {\n      const errorTime = new Date()\n      const durationSeconds = Math.floor((errorTime.getTime() - new Date().getTime()) / 1000)\n      \n      await SyncHistory.findByIdAndUpdate(syncHistoryId, {\n        status: 'failed',\n        completedAt: errorTime,\n        duration: durationSeconds,\n        $push: { errorDetails: message },\n        'stats.total': stats.total,\n        'stats.added': stats.inserted,\n        'stats.updated': stats.updated,\n        'stats.errors': stats.errors + 1\n      })\n    }\n\n    throw err\n  }\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// HELPER: PROCESS SINGLE ITEM\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nconst processSyncItem = async (\n  item: UniversalSourceItem,\n  config: UniversalSyncConfig\n): Promise<ProcessItemResult> => {\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // VALIDAÇÃO INICIAL\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  if (!item.email || !item.email.trim()) {\n    throw new Error('Item sem email')\n  }\n\n  const email = normalizeEmail(item.email)\n  const name = item.name && item.name.trim() ? item.name.trim() : email\n\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // BUSCAR OU CRIAR USER\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  let user = await User.findOne({ email })\n  const isNew = !user\n\n  if (!user) {\n    user = await User.create({\n      email,\n      name,\n      isActive: true\n    })\n    console.log(`✨ [UniversalSync] Novo user criado: ${user.email}`)\n  }\n\n  const userIdStr = String(user._id)\n\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // PREPARAR UPDATES DO USER\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  const updateFields: Record<string, unknown> = {}\n  let needsUpdate = false\n\n  if (name && user.name !== name) {\n    updateFields.name = name\n    needsUpdate = true\n  }\n\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // ✅ HOTMART - VERSÃO COMPLETA (MANTÉM TUDO!)\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  if (config.syncType === 'hotmart') {\n    // IDs\n    if (item.hotmartUserId) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.hotmartUserId'] = item.hotmartUserId\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ✅ DATAS (TODAS!)\n    const purchaseDate = toDateOrNull(item.purchaseDate)\n    const signupDate = toDateOrNull(item.signupDate)\n    const firstAccessDate = toDateOrNull(item.firstAccessDate)\n    const lastAccessDate = toDateOrNull(item.lastAccessDate)\n\n    if (purchaseDate) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.purchaseDate'] = purchaseDate\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n    if (signupDate) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.signupDate'] = signupDate\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n    if (firstAccessDate) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.firstAccessDate'] = firstAccessDate\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n    if (lastAccessDate) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.lastAccessDate'] = lastAccessDate\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // Status\n    if (item.plusAccess) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.plusAccess'] = item.plusAccess\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // Current Module\n    if (item.currentModule !== undefined) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.currentModule'] = toNumber(item.currentModule, 0)\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\nif (lastAccessDate) {\n  updateFields['hotmart.lastAccessDate'] = lastAccessDate\n  needsUpdate = true\n}\n    // Turmas\n    if (item.classId) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.enrolledClasses'] = [\n        {\n          classId: item.classId,\n          className: item.className || `Turma ${item.classId}`,\n          source: 'hotmart',\n          isActive: true,\n          enrolledAt: purchaseDate || new Date()\n        }\n      ]\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // Metadata\n    updateFields['hotmart.lastSyncAt'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['hotmart.syncVersion'] = '3.0'\n    updateFields['metadata.updatedAt'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['metadata.sources.hotmart.lastSync'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['metadata.sources.hotmart.version'] = '3.0'\n    needsUpdate = true\n  }\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// ✅ CURSEDUCA - VERSÃO COMPLETA COM TODOS OS CAMPOS NOVOS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  if (config.syncType === 'curseduca') {\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // IDs\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.curseducaUserId && item.curseducaUserId !== (user as any).curseduca?.curseducaUserId) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.curseducaUserId'] = item.curseducaUserId\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    if (item.curseducaUuid) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.curseducaUuid'] = item.curseducaUuid\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // 🆕 NOVO: enrollmentsCount (quantos produtos o user tem)\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.platformData?.enrollmentsCount !== undefined) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.enrollmentsCount'] = item.platformData.enrollmentsCount\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // GRUPOS\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.groupId) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.groupId'] = String(item.groupId)\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    if (item.groupName) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.groupName'] = item.groupName\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // SUBSCRIPTION TYPE\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.subscriptionType) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.subscriptionType'] = item.subscriptionType\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // 🆕 NOVO: Situation (ACTIVE/INACTIVE/SUSPENDED)\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.platformData?.situation) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.situation'] = item.platformData.situation\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // MEMBER STATUS (retrocompatibilidade)\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    updateFields['curseduca.memberStatus'] = 'ACTIVE'\n    needsUpdate = true\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // DATAS\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    \n    // lastAccess (retrocompatibilidade)\n    const lastAccess = toDateOrNull(item.lastAccess)\n    if (lastAccess) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.lastAccess'] = lastAccess\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // 🆕 NOVO: lastLogin (do endpoint /members/{id})\n    const lastLogin = toDateOrNull(item.lastLogin)\n    if (lastLogin) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.lastLogin'] = lastLogin\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // 🆕 NOVO: enrolledAt → joinedDate\n    const enrolledAt = toDateOrNull(item.enrolledAt)\n    if (enrolledAt) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.joinedDate'] = enrolledAt\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // PROGRESSO\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.progress?.percentage !== undefined) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.progress.estimatedProgress'] = toNumber(item.progress.percentage, 0)\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // METADATA DE SYNC\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    updateFields['curseduca.lastSyncAt'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['curseduca.syncVersion'] = '3.1'  // ✅ Versão atualizada\n    updateFields['metadata.updatedAt'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['metadata.sources.curseduca.lastSync'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['metadata.sources.curseduca.version'] = '3.1'\n    needsUpdate = true\n  }\n\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // DISCORD - Schema Segregado\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  if (config.syncType platform:code\n    PRODUCTS_CACHE.set(`${p.platform}:${p.code}`, p)\n\n    // Key (CursEduca): group_{groupId}\n    if (p.platform === 'curseduca' && (p as any).curseducaGroupId) {\n      PRODUCTS_CACHE.set(`group_${(p as any).curseducaGroupId}`, p)\n    }\n  }\n\n  PRODUCTS_CACHE_TIMESTAMP = now\n\n  debugLog(`✅ [ProductCache] ${products.length} produtos carregados em ${Date.now() - start}ms`)\n}\n\n/**\n * Limpar cache (útil para testes)\n */\nexport function clearProductsCache(): void {\n  PRODUCTS_CACHE = null\n  PRODUCTS_CACHE_TIMESTAMP = 0\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// ✅ NOVO: MAPEAMENTO DINÂMICO DE PRODUTOS (COM CACHE!)\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n/**\n * Determina o produto correto baseado nos dados do item e na plataforma\n * ✅ OTIMIZADO: Usa cache quando disponível\n */\nasync function determineProductId(\n  item: UniversalSourceItem,\n  syncType: SyncType\n): Promise<mongoose.Types.ObjectId | null> {\n\n  // ✅ Usar cache se disponível\n  const useCache = PRODUCTS_CACHE !== null\n\n  if (syncType === 'hotmart') {\n    const productCode = item.productCode || 'OGI_V1'\n\n    // Cache lookup\n    if (useCache) {\n      const cached = PRODUCTS_CACHE!.get(`hotmart:${productCode}`) || PRODUCTS_CACHE!.get(productCode)\n      if (cached) {\n        debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto Hotmart do cache: ${productCode}`)\n        return cached._id\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Fallback: query BD\n    const product = await Product.findOne({\n      code: productCode,\n      platform: 'hotmart',\n      isActive: true\n    }).select('_id').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n    if (!product) {\n      console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Produto Hotmart não encontrado: ${productCode}`)\n    }\n\n    return product?._id || null\n  }\n\n  if (syncType === 'curseduca') {\n    const groupId = String(item.groupId || '')\n\n    if (groupId) {\n      // Cache lookup por groupId\n      if (useCache) {\n        const cached = PRODUCTS_CACHE!.get(`group_${groupId}`)\n        if (cached) {\n          debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto CursEduca do cache (groupId ${groupId}): ${cached.code}`)\n          return cached._id\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Fallback: query BD\n      const product = await Product.findOne({\n        platform: 'curseduca',\n        curseducaGroupId: groupId,\n        isActive: true\n      }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n      if (product) {\n        debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto encontrado por groupId ${groupId}: ${product.code}`)\n        return product._id\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 2ª tentativa: subscriptionType\n    if (item.subscriptionType) {\n      const productCode =\n        item.subscriptionType === 'MONTHLY' ? 'CLAREZA_MENSAL' :\n        item.subscriptionType === 'ANNUAL' ? 'CLAREZA_ANUAL' :\n        null\n\n      if (productCode) {\n        // Cache lookup\n        if (useCache) {\n          const cached = PRODUCTS_CACHE!.get(productCode)\n          if (cached) {\n            debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto do cache (subscriptionType): ${productCode}`)\n            return cached._id\n          }\n        }\n\n        // Fallback: query BD\n        const product = await Product.findOne({\n          platform: 'curseduca',\n          code: productCode,\n          isActive: true\n        }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n        if (product) {\n          debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto encontrado por subscriptionType ${item.subscriptionType}: ${product.code}`)\n          return product._id\n        }\n\n        console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Produto não encontrado para subscriptionType: ${item.subscriptionType} (${productCode})`)\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 3ª tentativa: groupName (não usa cache - query dinâmica)\n    if (item.groupName) {\n      const product = await Product.findOne({\n        platform: 'curseduca',\n        name: { $regex: new RegExp(item.groupName, 'i') },\n        isActive: true\n      }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n      if (product) {\n        console.log(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto encontrado por groupName \"${item.groupName}\": ${product.code}`)\n        return product._id\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 4ª tentativa: default\n    if (useCache) {\n      const allCurseduca = Array.from(PRODUCTS_CACHE!.values()).find(p => p.platform === 'curseduca')\n      if (allCurseduca) {\n        console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Usando produto default CursEDuca: ${allCurseduca.code} (groupId: ${groupId})`)\n        return allCurseduca._id\n      }\n    }\n\n    const defaultProduct = await Product.findOne({\n      platform: 'curseduca',\n      isActive: true\n    }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n    if (defaultProduct) {\n      console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Usando produto default CursEDuca: ${defaultProduct.code} (groupId: ${groupId})`)\n      return defaultProduct._id\n    }\n\n    console.error(`❌ [ProductMapping] Nenhum produto CursEDuca ativo encontrado!`)\n    return null\n  }\n\n  if (syncType === 'discord') {\n    // Cache lookup\n    if (useCache) {\n      const cached = PRODUCTS_CACHE!.get('DISCORD_COMMUNITY') ||\n                     Array.from(PRODUCTS_CACHE!.values()).find(p => p.platform === 'discord')\n      if (cached) {\n        debugLog(`✅ [ProductMapping] Produto Discord do cache: ${cached.code}`)\n        return cached._id\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Fallback: query BD\n    const product = await Product.findOne({\n      $or: [\n        { code: 'DISCORD_COMMUNITY' },\n        { platform: 'discord', isActive: true }\n      ]\n    }).select('_id code').lean() as LeanProduct | null\n\n    if (!product) {\n      console.warn(`⚠️ [ProductMapping] Produto Discord não encontrado`)\n    }\n\n    return product?._id || null\n  }\n\n  return null\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// MAIN SYNC FUNCTION\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nexport const executeUniversalSync = async (\n  config: UniversalSyncConfig\n): Promise<UniversalSyncResult> => {\n  console.log('🚀 [UniversalSync] Iniciando sync:', config.jobName)\n  console.log(`   📊 Tipo: ${config.syncType}`)\n  console.log(`   🎯 Trigger: ${config.triggeredBy}`)\n  console.log(`   📦 Batch Size: ${config.batchSize}`)\n\n  const startTime = Date.now()\n\n  let reportId: string | null = null\n  let syncHistoryId: string | null = null\n\n  const stats = {\n    total: 0,\n    inserted: 0,\n    updated: 0,\n    errors: 0,\n    skipped: 0,\n    unchanged: 0\n  }\n\n  const errors: SyncError[] = []\n  const warnings: SyncWarning[] = []\n\n  let rid = ''\n  let hid = ''\n\n  try {\n    // ✅ OTIMIZAÇÃO FASE 1: Pre-load cache de produtos\n    await preloadProductsCache()\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 1: CRIAR SYNCREPORT\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    const report = await syncReportsService.createSyncReport({\n      jobId: config.jobId,\n      jobName: config.jobName,\n      syncType: config.syncType,\n      triggeredBy: config.triggeredBy,\n      triggeredByUser: config.triggeredByUser,\n      syncConfig: {\n        fullSync: config.fullSync,\n        includeProgress: config.includeProgress,\n        includeTags: config.includeTags,\n        batchSize: config.batchSize\n      }\n    })\n\n    rid = getDocId(report, 'SyncReport')\n    reportId = rid\n\n    console.log(`✅ [UniversalSync] Report criado: ${rid}`)\n\n    await syncReportsService.addReportLog(rid, 'info', `Iniciando sincronização ${config.syncType}`, {\n      fullSync: config.fullSync,\n      batchSize: config.batchSize,\n      dataSourceSize: Array.isArray(config.sourceData) ? config.sourceData.length : 1\n    })\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 2: CRIAR SYNCHISTORY\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    const syncHistory = await SyncHistory.create({\n      type: config.syncType,\n      status: 'running',\n      startedAt: new Date(),\n      stats: {\n        total: 0,\n        added: 0,\n        updated: 0,\n        conflicts: 0,\n        errors: 0\n      },\n      user: config.triggeredByUser || undefined,\n      triggeredBy: {\n        type: config.triggeredBy,\n        userId: config.triggeredByUser,\n        cronJobId: config.jobId\n      }\n    })\n\n    hid = getDocId(syncHistory, 'SyncHistory')\n    syncHistoryId = hid\n\n    console.log(`✅ [UniversalSync] SyncHistory criado: ${hid}`)\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 3: PROCESSAR DADOS\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    await syncReportsService.addReportLog(rid, 'info', 'Processando dados da fonte...')\n\n    const sourceArray = Array.isArray(config.sourceData) ? config.sourceData : [config.sourceData]\n    stats.total = sourceArray.length\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < sourceArray.length; i += config.batchSize) {\n      const batch = sourceArray.slice(i, i + config.batchSize)\n      const batchNumber = Math.floor(i / config.batchSize) + 1\n      const totalBatches = Math.ceil(sourceArray.length / config.batchSize)\n\n      console.log(`📦 [UniversalSync] Processando batch ${batchNumber}/${totalBatches} (${batch.length} itens)`)\n\n      await syncReportsService.addReportLog(\n        rid,\n        'info',\n        `Processando batch ${batchNumber}/${totalBatches}`,\n        { batchSize: batch.length, startIndex: i }\n      )\n\n      for (let j = 0; j < batch.length; j++) {\n        const item = batch[j]\n\n        try {\n          const result = await processSyncItem(item, config)\n\n          if (result.action === 'inserted') stats.inserted++\n          else if (result.action === 'updated') stats.updated++\n          else if (result.action === 'unchanged') stats.unchanged++\n          else if (result.action === 'skipped') stats.skipped++\n\n          if (config.onProgress) {\n            const current = i + j + 1\n            config.onProgress({\n              current,\n              total: stats.total,\n              percentage: (current / stats.total) * 100,\n              message: `Processando ${current}/${stats.total}`\n            })\n          }\n        } catch (err: unknown) {\n          stats.errors++\n\n          const e = err as { message?: unknown; stack?: unknown; code?: unknown }\n          const message = typeof e.message === 'string' ? e.message : 'Erro desconhecido'\n\n          const syncError: SyncError = {\n            message,\n            userId:\n              (typeof item.id === 'string' ? item.id : undefined) ||\n              (typeof item.userId === 'string' ? item.userId : undefined),\n            userEmail: item.email,\n            stack: typeof e.stack === 'string' ? e.stack : undefined,\n            code: typeof e.code === 'string' ? e.code : undefined\n          }\n\n          errors.push(syncError)\n\n          await syncReportsService.addReportError(\n            rid,\n            syncError.message,\n            syncError.userId,\n            syncError.userEmail,\n            syncError.stack\n          )\n\n          if (config.onError) config.onError(syncError)\n\n          console.error('❌ [UniversalSync] Erro ao processar item:', syncError.message)\n        }\n      }\n\n      if (i + config.batchSize < sourceArray.length) {\n        await new Promise<void>(resolve => {\n          setTimeout(() => resolve(), 100)\n        })\n      }\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 4: ATUALIZAR STATS\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    await syncReportsService.updateReportStats(rid, stats)\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 5: FINALIZAR REPORT\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    const finalStatus =\n      stats.errors > 0 ? (stats.errors === stats.total ? 'failed' : 'partial') : 'success'\n\n    await syncReportsService.completeReport(rid, finalStatus)\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 6: FINALIZAR SYNCHISTORY\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    const completedAt = new Date()\n    const durationSeconds = Math.floor((completedAt.getTime() - new Date(syncHistory.startedAt).getTime()) / 1000)\n\n    await SyncHistory.findByIdAndUpdate(syncHistoryId, {\n      status: 'completed',\n      completedAt,\n      'stats.total': stats.total,\n      'stats.added': stats.inserted,\n      'stats.updated': stats.updated,\n      'stats.errors': stats.errors,\n      duration: durationSeconds,\n      'metrics.duration': durationSeconds,\n      'metrics.usersPerSecond': durationSeconds > 0 ? stats.total / durationSeconds : 0,\n      'metrics.avgTimePerUser': stats.total > 0 ? (durationSeconds * 1000) / stats.total : 0\n    })\n\n    console.log(`✅ [UniversalSync] SyncHistory finalizado: ${syncHistoryId}`)\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // STEP 7: CALCULAR DURAÇÃO E RETORNAR\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n    const duration = Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000)\n\n    console.log('✅ [UniversalSync] Sync concluída!')\n    console.log(`   ⏱️ Duração: ${duration}s`)\n    console.log(`   📊 Stats: ${stats.inserted} novos, ${stats.updated} atualizados, ${stats.errors} erros`)\n\n    return {\n      success: finalStatus !== 'failed',\n      reportId: rid,\n      syncHistoryId: hid,\n      stats,\n      duration,\n      errors,\n      warnings\n    }\n  } catch (err: unknown) {\n    const e = err as { message?: unknown; stack?: unknown }\n    const message = typeof e.message === 'string' ? e.message : 'Erro desconhecido'\n    const stack = typeof e.stack === 'string' ? e.stack : undefined\n\n    console.error('❌ [UniversalSync] Erro fatal:', message)\n\n    if (reportId) {\n      await syncReportsService.addReportError(\n        reportId,\n        `Erro fatal: ${message}`,\n        undefined,\n        undefined,\n        stack\n      )\n      await syncReportsService.completeReport(reportId, 'failed')\n    }\n\n    if (syncHistoryId) {\n      const errorTime = new Date()\n      const durationSeconds = Math.floor((errorTime.getTime() - new Date().getTime()) / 1000)\n      \n      await SyncHistory.findByIdAndUpdate(syncHistoryId, {\n        status: 'failed',\n        completedAt: errorTime,\n        duration: durationSeconds,\n        $push: { errorDetails: message },\n        'stats.total': stats.total,\n        'stats.added': stats.inserted,\n        'stats.updated': stats.updated,\n        'stats.errors': stats.errors + 1\n      })\n    }\n\n    throw err\n  }\n}\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// HELPER: PROCESS SINGLE ITEM\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nconst processSyncItem = async (\n  item: UniversalSourceItem,\n  config: UniversalSyncConfig\n): Promise<ProcessItemResult> => {\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // VALIDAÇÃO INICIAL\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  if (!item.email || !item.email.trim()) {\n    throw new Error('Item sem email')\n  }\n\n  const email = normalizeEmail(item.email)\n  const name = item.name && item.name.trim() ? item.name.trim() : email\n\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // BUSCAR OU CRIAR USER\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  let user = await User.findOne({ email })\n  const isNew = !user\n\n  if (!user) {\n    user = await User.create({\n      email,\n      name,\n      isActive: true\n    })\n    console.log(`✨ [UniversalSync] Novo user criado: ${user.email}`)\n  }\n\n  const userIdStr = String(user._id)\n\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // PREPARAR UPDATES DO USER\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  const updateFields: Record<string, unknown> = {}\n  let needsUpdate = false\n\n  if (name && user.name !== name) {\n    updateFields.name = name\n    needsUpdate = true\n  }\n\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // ✅ HOTMART - VERSÃO COMPLETA (MANTÉM TUDO!)\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  if (config.syncType === 'hotmart') {\n    // IDs\n    if (item.hotmartUserId) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.hotmartUserId'] = item.hotmartUserId\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ✅ DATAS (TODAS!)\n    const purchaseDate = toDateOrNull(item.purchaseDate)\n    const signupDate = toDateOrNull(item.signupDate)\n    const firstAccessDate = toDateOrNull(item.firstAccessDate)\n    const lastAccessDate = toDateOrNull(item.lastAccessDate)\n\n    if (purchaseDate) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.purchaseDate'] = purchaseDate\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n    if (signupDate) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.signupDate'] = signupDate\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n    if (firstAccessDate) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.firstAccessDate'] = firstAccessDate\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n    if (lastAccessDate) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.lastAccessDate'] = lastAccessDate\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // Status\n    if (item.plusAccess) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.plusAccess'] = item.plusAccess\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // Current Module\n    if (item.currentModule !== undefined) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.currentModule'] = toNumber(item.currentModule, 0)\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\nif (lastAccessDate) {\n  updateFields['hotmart.lastAccessDate'] = lastAccessDate\n  needsUpdate = true\n}\n    // Turmas\n    if (item.classId) {\n      updateFields['hotmart.enrolledClasses'] = [\n        {\n          classId: item.classId,\n          className: item.className || `Turma ${item.classId}`,\n          source: 'hotmart',\n          isActive: true,\n          enrolledAt: purchaseDate || new Date()\n        }\n      ]\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // Metadata\n    updateFields['hotmart.lastSyncAt'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['hotmart.syncVersion'] = '3.0'\n    updateFields['metadata.updatedAt'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['metadata.sources.hotmart.lastSync'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['metadata.sources.hotmart.version'] = '3.0'\n    needsUpdate = true\n  }\n\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// ✅ CURSEDUCA - VERSÃO COMPLETA COM TODOS OS CAMPOS NOVOS\n// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  if (config.syncType === 'curseduca') {\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // IDs\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.curseducaUserId && item.curseducaUserId !== (user as any).curseduca?.curseducaUserId) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.curseducaUserId'] = item.curseducaUserId\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    if (item.curseducaUuid) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.curseducaUuid'] = item.curseducaUuid\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // 🆕 NOVO: enrollmentsCount (quantos produtos o user tem)\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.platformData?.enrollmentsCount !== undefined) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.enrollmentsCount'] = item.platformData.enrollmentsCount\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // GRUPOS\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.groupId) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.groupId'] = String(item.groupId)\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    if (item.groupName) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.groupName'] = item.groupName\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // SUBSCRIPTION TYPE\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.subscriptionType) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.subscriptionType'] = item.subscriptionType\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // 🆕 NOVO: Situation (ACTIVE/INACTIVE/SUSPENDED)\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.platformData?.situation) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.situation'] = item.platformData.situation\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // MEMBER STATUS (retrocompatibilidade)\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    updateFields['curseduca.memberStatus'] = 'ACTIVE'\n    needsUpdate = true\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // DATAS\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    \n    // lastAccess (retrocompatibilidade)\n    const lastAccess = toDateOrNull(item.lastAccess)\n    if (lastAccess) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.lastAccess'] = lastAccess\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // 🆕 NOVO: lastLogin (do endpoint /members/{id})\n    const lastLogin = toDateOrNull(item.lastLogin)\n    if (lastLogin) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.lastLogin'] = lastLogin\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // 🆕 NOVO: enrolledAt → joinedDate\n    const enrolledAt = toDateOrNull(item.enrolledAt)\n    if (enrolledAt) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.joinedDate'] = enrolledAt\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // PROGRESSO\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    if (item.progress?.percentage !== undefined) {\n      updateFields['curseduca.progress.estimatedProgress'] = toNumber(item.progress.percentage, 0)\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    // METADATA DE SYNC\n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n    updateFields['curseduca.lastSyncAt'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['curseduca.syncVersion'] = '3.1'  // ✅ Versão atualizada\n    updateFields['metadata.updatedAt'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['metadata.sources.curseduca.lastSync'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['metadata.sources.curseduca.version'] = '3.1'\n    needsUpdate = true\n  }\n\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // DISCORD - Schema Segregado\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  if (config.syncType === 'discord') {\n    if (item.discordUserId) {\n      updateFields['discord.discordIds'] = [item.discordUserId]\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    if (item.username) {\n      updateFields['discord.username'] = item.username\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    if (item.roles) {\n      updateFields['discord.roles'] = item.roles\n      needsUpdate = true\n    }\n\n    updateFields['discord.lastSyncAt'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['metadata.updatedAt'] = new Date()\n    updateFields['metadata.sources.discord.lastSync'] = new Date()\n    needsUpdate = true\n  }\n\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // APLICAR UPDATES NO USER\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  if (needsUpdate) {\n    await User.findByIdAndUpdate(userIdStr, { $set: updateFields })\n    debugLog(`🔄 [UniversalSync] User atualizado: ${user.email}`)\n  }\n\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  // ✅ CRIAR/ATUALIZAR USERPRODUCT AUTOMATICAMENTE\n  // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n  \n  try {\n    // 1. Determinar productId usando função escalável\n    const productId = await determineProductId(item, config.syncType)\n    \n    if (!productId) {\n      console.warn(`⚠️ [UniversalSync] Produto não encontrado para ${config.syncType} - user: ${user.email}`)\n      return { \n        action: isNew ? 'inserted' : (needsUpdate ? 'updated' : 'unchanged'), \n        userId: userIdStr \n      }\n    }\n    \n    // 2. Verificar se UserProduct já existe\n    const existingUP = await UserProduct.findOne({\n      userId: userIdStr,\n      productId: productId\n    })\n    \n    // ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\nexport const executeUniversalSync = async (\n  config: UniversalSyncConfig\n): Promise<UniversalSyncResult> => {\n  console.log('🚀
